C:\Users\ai\.codex\skills\memorytree-workflow\dist\heartbeat-WT5XYK23.js.map:1:{"version":3,"sources":["../src/heartbeat/alert.ts","../src/heartbeat/sync.ts","../src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts"],"sourcesContent":["/**\r\n * Manage ~/.memorytree/alerts.json — append, dedup, threshold, display.\r\n * Port of scripts/_alert_utils.py\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport { existsSync, mkdirSync, readFileSync, unlinkSync, writeFileSync } from 'node:fs'\r\nimport { homedir } from 'node:os'\r\nimport { dirname, resolve } from 'node:path'\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Constants\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nexport const MAX_ALERTS = 100\r\n\r\nexport const ALERT_TYPES: ReadonlySet<string> = new Set([\r\n  'no_remote',\r\n  'sensitive_match',\r\n  'push_failed',\r\n  'lock_held',\r\n])\r\n\r\nexport const FAILURE_THRESHOLD = 3\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Types\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nexport interface Alert {\r\n  readonly timestamp: string\r\n  readonly project: string\r\n  readonly type: string\r\n  readonly message: string\r\n  readonly count: number\r\n  readonly [key: string]: unknown\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Path helpers\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nexport function alertsPath(): string {\r\n  return resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree', 'alerts.json')\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction failureStatePath(): string {\r\n  return resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree', 'failure_counts.json')\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Timestamp helper (self-contained — no cross-module dependency)\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nfunction utcTimestamp(): string {\r\n  return new Date().toISOString().replace(/\\.\\d{3}Z$/, 'Z')\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Read / Write alerts\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nexport function readAlerts(): readonly Alert[] {\r\n  const path = alertsPath()\r\n  if (!existsSync(path)) {\r\n    return []\r\n  }\r\n  try {\r\n    const text = readFileSync(path, 'utf-8')\r\n    const data: unknown = JSON.parse(text)\r\n    if (!Array.isArray(data)) {\r\n      return []\r\n    }\r\n    return data as Alert[]\r\n  } catch {\r\n    return []\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function writeAlert(project: string, alertType: string, message: string): void {\r\n  const alerts = readAlerts()\r\n  const now = utcTimestamp()\r\n\r\n  let found = false\r\n  const updated: Alert[] = []\r\n\r\n  for (const alert of alerts) {\r\n    if (alert.project === project && alert.type === alertType) {\r\n      updated.push({\r\n        ...alert,\r\n        timestamp: now,\r\n        message,\r\n        count: (alert.count ?? 1) + 1,\r\n      })\r\n      found = true\r\n    } else {\r\n      updated.push({ ...alert })\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (!found) {\r\n    updated.push({ timestamp: now, project, type: alertType, message, count: 1 })\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const trimmed = updated.length > MAX_ALERTS\r\n    ? updated.slice(updated.length - MAX_ALERTS)\r\n    : updated\r\n\r\n  saveAlerts(trimmed)\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Threshold-based writes\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nexport function writeAlertWithThreshold(\r\n  project: string,\r\n  alertType: string,\r\n  message: string,\r\n): void {\r\n  const counts = readFailureCounts()\r\n  const key = `${project}::${alertType}`\r\n  const current = ((counts[key] as number | undefined) ?? 0) + 1\r\n  const newCounts: Record<string, number> = { ...counts, [key]: current }\r\n  saveFailureCounts(newCounts)\r\n\r\n  if (current >= FAILURE_THRESHOLD) {\r\n    writeAlert(project, alertType, message)\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function resetFailureCount(project: string, alertType: string): void {\r\n  const counts = readFailureCounts()\r\n  const key = `${project}::${alertType}`\r\n  if (key in counts) {\r\n    const newCounts: Record<string, number> = {}\r\n    for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(counts)) {\r\n      if (k !== key) {\r\n        newCounts[k] = v\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n    saveFailureCounts(newCounts)\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Clear\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nexport function clearAlerts(): void {\r\n  const path = alertsPath()\r\n  if (existsSync(path)) {\r\n    try {\r\n      unlinkSync(path)\r\n    } catch {\r\n      // Silently ignore removal errors (matches Python behaviour)\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Display\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nexport function formatAlertsForDisplay(alerts: readonly Record<string, unknown>[]): string {\r\n  if (alerts.length === 0) {\r\n    return ''\r\n  }\r\n  const lines: string[] = []\r\n  for (const alert of alerts) {\r\n    const count = typeof alert['count'] === 'number' ? alert['count'] : 1\r\n    const countSuffix = count > 1 ? ` (x${String(count)})` : ''\r\n    const type = typeof alert['type'] === 'string' ? alert['type'] : 'unknown'\r\n    const project = typeof alert['project'] === 'string' ? alert['project'] : '?'\r\n    const message = typeof alert['message'] === 'string' ? alert['message'] : ''\r\n    lines.push(`  [${type}] ${project}: ${message}${countSuffix}`)\r\n  }\r\n  return lines.join('\\n')\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Internal — alerts persistence\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nfunction saveAlerts(alerts: readonly Alert[]): void {\r\n  const path = alertsPath()\r\n  mkdirSync(dirname(path), { recursive: true })\r\n  writeFileSync(path, JSON.stringify(alerts, null, 2) + '\\n', 'utf-8')\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Internal — failure counts persistence\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nfunction readFailureCounts(): Record<string, number> {\r\n  const path = failureStatePath()\r\n  if (!existsSync(path)) {\r\n    return {}\r\n  }\r\n  try {\r\n    const text = readFileSync(path, 'utf-8')\r\n    const data: unknown = JSON.parse(text)\r\n    if (data === null || typeof data !== 'object' || Array.isArray(data)) {\r\n      return {}\r\n    }\r\n    return data as Record<string, number>\r\n  } catch {\r\n    return {}\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction saveFailureCounts(counts: Record<string, number>): void {\r\n  const path = failureStatePath()\r\n  mkdirSync(dirname(path), { recursive: true })\r\n  writeFileSync(path, JSON.stringify(counts, null, 2) + '\\n', 'utf-8')\r\n}\r\n","import { copyFileSync, existsSync, lstatSync, mkdirSync, readdirSync, rmSync } from 'node:fs'\r\nimport { dirname, join, resolve } from 'node:path'\r\n\r\nimport type { ProjectEntry } from './config.js'\r\n\r\nexport const DEV_TO_MEMORY_PATHS = [\r\n  'AGENTS.md',\r\n  'Memory/01_goals',\r\n  'Memory/02_todos',\r\n  'Memory/03_chat_logs',\r\n  'Memory/04_knowledge',\r\n  'Memory/05_archive',\r\n] as const\r\n\r\nexport const MEMORY_TO_DEV_PATHS = [\r\n  'Memory/06_transcripts',\r\n  'Memory/07_reports',\r\n] as const\r\n\r\nexport const MANAGED_REPO_PATHS = [\r\n  ...DEV_TO_MEMORY_PATHS,\r\n  ...MEMORY_TO_DEV_PATHS,\r\n] as const\r\n\r\nexport interface SyncStats {\r\n  readonly copied: number\r\n  readonly deleted: number\r\n  readonly skipped: boolean\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function projectUsesIsolatedMemoryPath(project: ProjectEntry): boolean {\r\n  return normalizeComparablePath(project.development_path) !== normalizeComparablePath(project.memory_path)\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function syncProjectContextToMemory(project: ProjectEntry): SyncStats {\r\n  if (!projectUsesIsolatedMemoryPath(project)) {\r\n    return { copied: 0, deleted: 0, skipped: true }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return syncPathSet(project.development_path, project.memory_path, DEV_TO_MEMORY_PATHS)\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function syncProjectOutputsToDevelopment(project: ProjectEntry): SyncStats {\r\n  if (!projectUsesIsolatedMemoryPath(project)) {\r\n    return { copied: 0, deleted: 0, skipped: true }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return syncPathSet(project.memory_path, project.development_path, MEMORY_TO_DEV_PATHS)\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction syncPathSet(\r\n  sourceRoot: string,\r\n  targetRoot: string,\r\n  relativePaths: readonly string[],\r\n): SyncStats {\r\n  let copied = 0\r\n  let deleted = 0\r\n\r\n  for (const relativePath of relativePaths) {\r\n    const stats = syncManagedPath(\r\n      resolve(sourceRoot, relativePath),\r\n      resolve(targetRoot, relativePath),\r\n    )\r\n    copied += stats.copied\r\n    deleted += stats.deleted\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return {\r\n    copied,\r\n    deleted,\r\n    skipped: false,\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction syncManagedPath(sourcePath: string, targetPath: string): Omit<SyncStats, 'skipped'> {\r\n  if (!existsSync(sourcePath)) {\r\n    return {\r\n      copied: 0,\r\n      deleted: removeTree(targetPath),\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const sourceStats = lstatSync(sourcePath)\r\n  if (sourceStats.isDirectory()) {\r\n    return syncDirectory(sourcePath, targetPath)\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  mkdirSync(dirname(targetPath), { recursive: true })\r\n  if (existsSync(targetPath) && lstatSync(targetPath).isDirectory()) {\r\n    rmSync(targetPath, { recursive: true, force: true })\r\n  }\r\n  copyFileSync(sourcePath, targetPath)\r\n  return { copied: 1, deleted: 0 }\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction syncDirectory(sourceDir: string, targetDir: string): Omit<SyncStats, 'skipped'> {\r\n  if (existsSync(targetDir) && !lstatSync(targetDir).isDirectory()) {\r\n    rmSync(targetDir, { recursive: true, force: true })\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  mkdirSync(targetDir, { recursive: true })\r\n\r\n  let copied = 0\r\n  let deleted = 0\r\n  const sourceNames = new Set(readdirSync(sourceDir))\r\n\r\n  for (const name of sourceNames) {\r\n    const stats = syncManagedPath(join(sourceDir, name), join(targetDir, name))\r\n    copied += stats.copied\r\n    deleted += stats.deleted\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  for (const name of readdirSync(targetDir)) {\r\n    if (sourceNames.has(name)) continue\r\n    deleted += removeTree(join(targetDir, name))\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return { copied, deleted }\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction removeTree(targetPath: string): number {\r\n  if (!existsSync(targetPath)) {\r\n    return 0\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const count = countFiles(targetPath)\r\n  rmSync(targetPath, { recursive: true, force: true })\r\n  return count\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction countFiles(targetPath: string): number {\r\n  const stats = lstatSync(targetPath)\r\n  if (!stats.isDirectory()) {\r\n    return 1\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  let total = 0\r\n  for (const name of readdirSync(targetPath)) {\r\n    total += countFiles(join(targetPath, name))\r\n  }\r\n  return total\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction normalizeComparablePath(value: string): string {\r\n  return resolve(value).replace(/\\\\/g, '/').replace(/\\/+$/, '')\r\n}\r\n","/**\r\n * MemoryTree heartbeat — single execution, stateless, idempotent.\r\n * Port of scripts/heartbeat.py\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport type { ParsedTranscript } from '../types/transcript.js'\r\nimport { discoverSourceFiles, transcriptMatchesRepo } from '../transcript/discover.js'\r\nimport { importTranscript, transcriptHasContent } from '../transcript/import.js'\r\nimport { parseTranscript } from '../transcript/parse.js'\r\nimport { slugify } from '../transcript/common.js'\r\nimport { defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot } from '../transcript/discover.js'\r\nimport type { Config, ProjectEntry, RawUploadPermission } from './config.js'\r\nimport {\r\n  findProjectForPath,\r\n  loadConfig,\r\n  noteProjectHeartbeatRun,\r\n  projectDisplayName,\r\n  projectExecutionPath,\r\n  projectIsDue,\r\n  saveConfig,\r\n} from './config.js'\r\nimport { acquireLock, releaseLock } from './lock.js'\r\nimport { resetFailureCount, writeAlert, writeAlertWithThreshold } from './alert.js'\r\nimport type { LogLevel } from './log.js'\r\nimport { getLogger, setupLogging } from './log.js'\r\nimport { MANAGED_REPO_PATHS, syncProjectContextToMemory, syncProjectOutputsToDevelopment } from './sync.js'\r\nimport { collectExtraManifestDirs } from '../report/extra-manifests.js'\r\nimport {\r\n  ensureBranchUpstream,\r\n  ensureProjectWorktree,\r\n  hasTrackingUpstream,\r\n  isProjectMemoryBranch,\r\n} from './worktree.js'\r\nimport { git } from '../utils/exec.js'\r\nimport { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'\r\nimport { basename, join, resolve } from 'node:path'\r\nimport { existsSync } from 'node:fs'\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Sensitive pattern detection\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nconst SENSITIVE_PATTERNS: readonly RegExp[] = [\r\n  /(?:api[_-]?key|apikey)\\s*[:=]\\s*\\S+/i,\r\n  /(?:password|passwd|pwd)\\s*[:=]\\s*\\S+/i,\r\n  /(?:secret|token)\\s*[:=]\\s*\\S+/i,\r\n  /(?:sk-|pk_live_|sk_live_|ghp_|gho_|glpat-)\\S{10,}/,\r\n  /Bearer\\s+\\S{20,}/i,\r\n]\r\n\r\nconst RAW_TRANSCRIPT_PREFIX = 'Memory/06_transcripts/raw/'\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Main entry point\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nexport interface HeartbeatRunOptions {\r\n  readonly force?: boolean\r\n  readonly root?: string\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport async function main(options: HeartbeatRunOptions = {}): Promise<number> {\r\n  const config = loadConfig()\r\n  setupLogging(config.log_level as LogLevel)\r\n  const logger = getLogger()\r\n\r\n  if (!acquireLock()) {\r\n    logger.info('Another heartbeat instance is running. Exiting.')\r\n    writeAlert('global', 'lock_held', 'Heartbeat exited: another instance held the lock.')\r\n    return 0\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  try {\r\n    return await runHeartbeat(config, options)\r\n  } finally {\r\n    releaseLock()\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Heartbeat orchestration\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nexport async function runHeartbeat(config: Config, options: HeartbeatRunOptions = {}): Promise<number> {\r\n  const logger = getLogger()\r\n  const targetProject = options.root ? findProjectForPath(config, resolve(options.root)) : null\r\n\r\n  if (config.projects.length === 0) {\r\n    logger.info('No projects registered in config.toml. Nothing to do.')\r\n    return 0\r\n  }\r\n  if (options.root && !targetProject) {\r\n    logger.warn(`No registered project matched: ${resolve(options.root)}`)\r\n    return 1\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const projects = targetProject ? [targetProject] : config.projects\r\n\r\n  logger.info(`Heartbeat started. ${projects.length} project(s) selected.`)\r\n\r\n  let nextConfig = config\r\n  let configChanged = false\r\n  const now = new Date()\r\n  const runTimestamp = now.toISOString()\r\n\r\n  for (const entry of projects) {\r\n    const projectName = projectDisplayName(entry)\r\n    const projectPath = resolve(projectExecutionPath(entry))\r\n    const heartbeatDue = options.force === true || projectIsDue(entry, now)\r\n\r\n    if (!heartbeatDue) {\r\n      logger.debug(`[${projectName}] Not due yet, skipping.`)\r\n      continue\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    try {\r\n      const worktree = ensureProjectWorktree(entry)\r\n      if (!existsSync(projectPath)) {\r\n        logger.warn(`Project path does not exist, skipping: ${projectPath}`)\r\n        continue\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      if (worktree.created) {\r\n        logger.info(`[${projectName}] Created worktree on branch '${worktree.branch}'.`)\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      const contextSync = syncProjectContextToMemory(entry)\r\n      if (!contextSync.skipped) {\r\n        logger.info(\r\n          `[${projectName}] Synced context to ${worktree.branch} ` +\r\n          `(copied ${contextSync.copied}, deleted ${contextSync.deleted}).`,\r\n        )\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      const extraManifestDirs = collectExtraManifestDirs(projectPath)\r\n      await processProject(config, projectPath, projectName, entry, extraManifestDirs)\r\n      nextConfig = noteProjectHeartbeatRun(nextConfig, entry.id, runTimestamp)\r\n      configChanged = true\r\n\r\n      const outputSync = syncProjectOutputsToDevelopment(entry)\r\n      if (!outputSync.skipped) {\r\n        logger.info(\r\n          `[${projectName}] Synced outputs back to development directory ` +\r\n          `(copied ${outputSync.copied}, deleted ${outputSync.deleted}).`,\r\n        )\r\n      }\r\n    } catch (err: unknown) {\r\n      logger.exception(`Error processing project: ${projectPath}`, err)\r\n      writeAlertWithThreshold(\r\n        toPosixPath(projectPath),\r\n        'push_failed',\r\n        `Heartbeat error for project: ${basename(projectPath)}`,\r\n      )\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (configChanged) {\r\n    saveConfig(nextConfig)\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  logger.info('Heartbeat finished.')\r\n  return 0\r\n}\r\n\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n// Per-project processing\r\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\r\n\r\nexport async function processProject(\r\n  config: Config,\r\n  projectPath: string,\r\n  projectName: string,\r\n  project?: ProjectEntry,\r\n  extraManifestDirs?: string[],\r\n): Promise<void> {\r\n  const logger = getLogger()\r\n  const repoSlug = slugify(projectName, 'project')\r\n  const globalRoot = defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot()\r\n  const branch = currentBranch(projectPath)\r\n  const mirrorToRepo = isDedicatedMemorytreeBranch(branch, project)\r\n  const autoPush = project?.auto_push ?? config.auto_push ?? true\r\n  const generateReport = project?.generate_report ?? config.generate_report ?? false\r\n  const aiSummaryModel = project?.ai_summary_model ?? config.ai_summary_model ?? 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001'\r\n  const locale = project?.locale ?? config.locale ?? 'en'\r\n  const ghPagesBranch = project?.gh_pages_branch ?? config.gh_pages_branch ?? ''\r\n  const cname = project?.cname ?? config.cname ?? ''\r\n  const webhookUrl = project?.webhook_url ?? config.webhook_url ?? ''\r\n  const reportBaseUrl = project?.report_base_url ?? config.report_base_url ?? ''\r\n  const rawUploadPermission = project?.raw_upload_permission ?? 'not-set'\r\n\r\n  if (!mirrorToRepo) {\r\n    logger.warn(\r\n      `[${projectName}] Current branch '${branch}' is not a dedicated MemoryTree branch. ` +\r\n      'Importing to the global archive only.',\r\n    )\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  const discovered = discoverSourceFiles()\r\n  let importedCount = 0\r\n\r\n  for (const [client, source] of discovered) {\r\n    let parsed: ParsedTranscript\r\n    try {\r\n      parsed = parseTranscript(client, source)\r\n    } catch {\r\n      logger.debug(`Failed to parse ${source}, skipping.`)\r\n      continue\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    if (!transcriptHasContent(parsed)) continue\r\n    if (!transcriptMatchesRepo(parsed, projectPath, repoSlug)) continue\r\n\r\n    scanSensitive(parsed, projectPath)\r\n\r\n    try {\r\n      await importTranscript(parsed, projectPath, globalRoot, repoSlug, rawUploadPermission, mirrorToRepo)\r\n      importedCount++\r\n    } catch {\r\n      logger.exception(`Failed to import transcript: ${source}`)\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (importedCount === 0) {\r\n    logger.…28444 tokens truncated…t: number\r\n  readonly exposure: ProjectEntry['report_exposure']\r\n  readonly reportDir: string\r\n  readonly localUrls: readonly string[]\r\n  readonly lanUrls: readonly string[]\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport interface ManagedCaddyEnableResult {\r\n  readonly mainConfigPath: string\r\n  readonly fragmentPath: string\r\n  readonly reportDir: string\r\n  readonly localUrls: readonly string[]\r\n  readonly lanUrls: readonly string[]\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function managedCaddyPaths(projectId: string): ManagedCaddyPaths {\r\n  const rootDir = resolve(memorytreeRoot(), 'caddy')\r\n  const sitesDir = resolve(rootDir, 'sites')\r\n  return {\r\n    rootDir,\r\n    sitesDir,\r\n    mainConfigPath: resolve(rootDir, 'Caddyfile'),\r\n    fragmentPath: resolve(sitesDir, `${projectId}.caddy`),\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function projectReportDir(project: Pick<ProjectEntry, 'development_path'>): string {\r\n  return resolve(project.development_path, 'Memory', '07_reports')\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function renderManagedMainCaddyfile(): string {\r\n  return [\r\n    '# Managed by MemoryTree. Do not edit by hand.',\r\n    '{',\r\n    '  auto_https off',\r\n    '}',\r\n    '',\r\n    'import sites/*.caddy',\r\n    '',\r\n  ].join('\\n')\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function renderManagedProjectFragment(\r\n  project: Pick<ProjectEntry, 'id' | 'name' | 'report_port' | 'report_exposure'>,\r\n  reportDir: string,\r\n): string {\r\n  const lines = [\r\n    '# Managed by MemoryTree. Do not edit by hand.',\r\n    `# project_id: ${project.id}`,\r\n    `# project_name: ${project.name}`,\r\n    `# report_port: ${String(project.report_port)}`,\r\n    `# report_exposure: ${project.report_exposure}`,\r\n    '',\r\n    managedSiteAddress(project.report_port, project.report_exposure),\r\n    '{',\r\n  ]\r\n\r\n  if (project.report_exposure === 'local') {\r\n    lines.push('  bind 127.0.0.1 [::1]')\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  lines.push(`  root * ${quoteForCaddyPath(reportDir)}`)\r\n  lines.push('  file_server')\r\n  lines.push('}')\r\n  lines.push('')\r\n  return lines.join('\\n')\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function isCaddyInstalled(): boolean {\r\n  try {\r\n    execCommand('caddy', ['version'])\r\n    return true\r\n  } catch {\r\n    return false\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function findManagedPortConflict(projectId: string, reportPort: number): string | null {\r\n  const { sitesDir, fragmentPath } = managedCaddyPaths(projectId)\r\n  if (!existsSync(sitesDir)) return null\r\n\r\n  for (const entry of readdirSync(sitesDir)) {\r\n    if (!entry.endsWith('.caddy')) continue\r\n    const currentPath = resolve(sitesDir, entry)\r\n    if (currentPath === fragmentPath) continue\r\n\r\n    const text = readFileSync(currentPath, 'utf-8')\r\n    const portMatch = text.match(/^# report_port:\\s*(\\d+)\\s*$/m)\r\n    if (!portMatch) continue\r\n\r\n    const currentPort = parseInt(portMatch[1]!, 10)\r\n    if (currentPort !== reportPort) continue\r\n\r\n    const projectMatch = text.match(/^# project_id:\\s*(.+)\\s*$/m)\r\n    return projectMatch?.[1]?.trim() || entry.replace(/\\.caddy$/i, '')\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return null\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function enableManagedCaddy(project: ProjectEntry): ManagedCaddyEnableResult {\r\n  const paths = managedCaddyPaths(project.id)\r\n  const conflictProjectId = findManagedPortConflict(project.id, project.report_port)\r\n  if (conflictProjectId !== null) {\r\n    throw new Error(\r\n      `Port ${String(project.report_port)} is already used by another managed Caddy site (${conflictProjectId}). ` +\r\n      'Change this project\\'s report_port first, then rerun the command.',\r\n    )\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  mkdirSync(paths.rootDir, { recursive: true })\r\n  mkdirSync(paths.sitesDir, { recursive: true })\r\n\r\n  const reportDir = projectReportDir(project)\r\n  mkdirSync(reportDir, { recursive: true })\r\n\r\n  writeTextIfChanged(paths.mainConfigPath, renderManagedMainCaddyfile())\r\n  writeTextIfChanged(paths.fragmentPath, renderManagedProjectFragment(project, reportDir))\r\n  validateManagedCaddyConfig(paths.mainConfigPath)\r\n  try {\r\n    reloadManagedCaddy(paths.mainConfigPath)\r\n  } catch (error: unknown) {\r\n    throw new Error(\r\n      `Caddy config files were updated, but reload failed. ${formatExecError(error)} ` +\r\n      `Start Caddy with: ${managedCaddyStartCommand()}`,\r\n    )\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return {\r\n    mainConfigPath: paths.mainConfigPath,\r\n    fragmentPath: paths.fragmentPath,\r\n    reportDir,\r\n    localUrls: localUrlsForProject(project.report_port),\r\n    lanUrls: lanUrlsForProject(project.report_port, project.report_exposure),\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function disableManagedCaddy(project: Pick<ProjectEntry, 'id' | 'report_port' | 'report_exposure'>): ManagedCaddyEnableResult {\r\n  const paths = managedCaddyPaths(project.id)\r\n  if (existsSync(paths.fragmentPath)) {\r\n    rmSync(paths.fragmentPath, { force: true })\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (existsSync(paths.mainConfigPath)) {\r\n    validateManagedCaddyConfig(paths.mainConfigPath)\r\n    try {\r\n      reloadManagedCaddy(paths.mainConfigPath)\r\n    } catch (error: unknown) {\r\n      throw new Error(\r\n        `The project fragment was removed, but Caddy reload failed. ${formatExecError(error)} ` +\r\n        `Start Caddy with: ${managedCaddyStartCommand()}`,\r\n      )\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return {\r\n    mainConfigPath: paths.mainConfigPath,\r\n    fragmentPath: paths.fragmentPath,\r\n    reportDir: '',\r\n    localUrls: localUrlsForProject(project.report_port),\r\n    lanUrls: lanUrlsForProject(project.report_port, project.report_exposure),\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport async function loadManagedCaddyStatus(project: ProjectEntry): Promise<ManagedCaddyStatus> {\r\n  const paths = managedCaddyPaths(project.id)\r\n  const installed = isCaddyInstalled()\r\n  const mainConfigExists = existsSync(paths.mainConfigPath)\r\n  const fragmentExists = existsSync(paths.fragmentPath)\r\n  const runningConfigText = installed ? await fetchRunningCaddyConfigText() : null\r\n  const running = runningConfigText !== null\r\n\r\n  let usingManagedConfig: boolean | null = null\r\n  if (installed && running && mainConfigExists) {\r\n    const managedConfigText = adaptManagedCaddyConfig(paths.mainConfigPath)\r\n    usingManagedConfig = stableJsonFromText(managedConfigText) === stableJsonFromText(runningConfigText)\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  return {\r\n    installed,\r\n    running,\r\n    usingManagedConfig,\r\n    mainConfigPath: paths.mainConfigPath,\r\n    mainConfigExists,\r\n    fragmentPath: paths.fragmentPath,\r\n    fragmentExists,\r\n    port: project.report_port,\r\n    exposure: project.report_exposure,\r\n    reportDir: projectReportDir(project),\r\n    localUrls: localUrlsForProject(project.report_port),\r\n    lanUrls: lanUrlsForProject(project.report_port, project.report_exposure),\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function managedCaddyStartCommand(): string {\r\n  const mainConfigPath = managedCaddyPaths('placeholder').mainConfigPath\r\n  return `caddy run --config \"${mainConfigPath}\" --adapter caddyfile`\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction managedSiteAddress(reportPort: number, exposure: ProjectEntry['report_exposure']): string {\r\n  if (exposure === 'lan') {\r\n    return `http://:${String(reportPort)}`\r\n  }\r\n  return `http://127.0.0.1:${String(reportPort)}, http://localhost:${String(reportPort)}`\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction quoteForCaddyPath(value: string): string {\r\n  const normalized = toPosixPath(resolve(value)).replace(/\"/g, '\\\\\"')\r\n  return `\"${normalized}\"`\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction writeTextIfChanged(path: string, content: string): void {\r\n  if (existsSync(path) && readFileSync(path, 'utf-8') === content) {\r\n    return\r\n  }\r\n  writeFileSync(path, content, 'utf-8')\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction validateManagedCaddyConfig(mainConfigPath: string): void {\r\n  execCommand('caddy', ['adapt', '--config', mainConfigPath, '--adapter', 'caddyfile', '--validate'], {\r\n    allowFailure: false,\r\n  })\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction reloadManagedCaddy(mainConfigPath: string): void {\r\n  execCommand('caddy', ['reload', '--config', mainConfigPath, '--adapter', 'caddyfile'])\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction adaptManagedCaddyConfig(mainConfigPath: string): string {\r\n  return execCommand('caddy', ['adapt', '--config', mainConfigPath, '--adapter', 'caddyfile'])\r\n}\r\n\r\nasync function fetchRunningCaddyConfigText(): Promise<string | null> {\r\n  try {\r\n    const response = await fetch(`${CADDY_ADMIN_URL}/config/`, {\r\n      headers: {\r\n        Origin: CADDY_ADMIN_ORIGIN,\r\n      },\r\n    })\r\n    if (!response.ok) return null\r\n    return await response.text()\r\n  } catch {\r\n    return null\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction stableJsonFromText(text: string | null): string | null {\r\n  if (text === null) return null\r\n  try {\r\n    return JSON.stringify(sortJsonKeys(JSON.parse(text)))\r\n  } catch {\r\n    return null\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction sortJsonKeys(value: unknown): unknown {\r\n  if (Array.isArray(value)) {\r\n    return value.map(item => sortJsonKeys(item))\r\n  }\r\n  if (value !== null && typeof value === 'object') {\r\n    return Object.fromEntries(\r\n      Object.keys(value)\r\n        .sort((left, right) => left.localeCompare(right))\r\n        .map(key => [key, sortJsonKeys((value as Record<string, unknown>)[key])]),\r\n    )\r\n  }\r\n  return value\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction localUrlsForProject(reportPort: number): string[] {\r\n  return [\r\n    `http://127.0.0.1:${String(reportPort)}/`,\r\n    `http://localhost:${String(reportPort)}/`,\r\n  ]\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction lanUrlsForProject(\r\n  reportPort: number,\r\n  exposure: ProjectEntry['report_exposure'],\r\n): string[] {\r\n  if (exposure !== 'lan') return []\r\n\r\n  const urls = new Set<string>()\r\n  const interfaces = networkInterfaces()\r\n  for (const addresses of Object.values(interfaces)) {\r\n    for (const address of addresses ?? []) {\r\n      if (address.family !== 'IPv4' || address.internal) continue\r\n      urls.add(`http://${address.address}:${String(reportPort)}/`)\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n  return [...urls].sort((left, right) => left.localeCompare(right))\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction formatExecError(error: unknown): string {\r\n  if (error instanceof Error && error.message) {\r\n    return error.message\r\n  }\r\n  return String(error)\r\n}\r\n"],"mappings":";;;;;;;;;;;;;;AAAA,SAAS,WAAAA,gBAAe;;;ACAxB,SAAS,YAAY,WAAW,cAAc,aAAa,QAAQ,qBAAqB;AACxF,SAAS,yBAAyB;AAClC,SAAS,eAAe;AAMxB,IAAM,kBAAkB;AACxB,IAAM,qBAAqB;AAgCpB,SAAS,kBAAkB,WAAsC;AACtE,QAAM,UAAU,QAAQ,eAAe,GAAG,OAAO;AACjD,QAAM,WAAW,QAAQ,SAAS,OAAO;AACzC,SAAO;AAAA,IACL;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,IACA,gBAAgB,QAAQ,SAAS,WAAW;AAAA,IAC5C,cAAc,QAAQ,UAAU,GAAG,SAAS,QAAQ;AAAA,EACtD;AACF;AAEO,SAAS,iBAAiB,SAAyD;AACxF,SAAO,QAAQ,QAAQ,kBAAkB,UAAU,YAAY;AACjE;AAEO,SAAS,6BAAqC;AACnD,SAAO;AAAA,IACL;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,IACA;AAAA,EACF,EAAE,KAAK,IAAI;AACb;AAEO,SAAS,6BACd,SACA,WACQ;AACR,QAAM,QAAQ;AAAA,IACZ;AAAA,IACA,iBAAiB,QAAQ,EAAE;AAAA,IAC3B,mBAAmB,QAAQ,IAAI;AAAA,IAC/B,kBAAkB,OAAO,QAAQ,WAAW,CAAC;AAAA,IAC7C,sBAAsB,QAAQ,eAAe;AAAA,IAC7C;AAAA,IACA,mBAAmB,QAAQ,aAAa,QAAQ,eAAe;AAAA,IAC/D;AAAA,EACF;AAEA,MAAI,QAAQ,oBAAoB,SAAS;AACvC,UAAM,KAAK,wBAAwB;AAAA,EACrC;AAEA,QAAM,KAAK,YAAY,kBAAkB,SAAS,CAAC,EAAE;AACrD,QAAM,KAAK,eAAe;AAC1B,QAAM,KAAK,GAAG;AACd,QAAM,KAAK,EAAE;AACb,SAAO,MAAM,KAAK,IAAI;AACxB;AAEO,SAAS,mBAA4B;AAC1C,MAAI;AACF,gBAAY,SAAS,CAAC,SAAS,CAAC;AAChC,WAAO;AAAA,EACT,QAAQ;AACN,WAAO;AAAA,EACT;AACF;AAEO,SAAS,wBAAwB,WAAmB,YAAmC;AAC5F,QAAM,EAAE,UAAU,aAAa,IAAI,kBAAkB,SAAS;AAC9D,MAAI,CAAC,WAAW,QAAQ,EAAG,QAAO;AAElC,aAAW,SAAS,YAAY,QAAQ,GAAG;AACzC,QAAI,CAAC,MAAM,SAAS,QAAQ,EAAG;AAC/B,UAAM,cAAc,QAAQ,UAAU,KAAK;AAC3C,QAAI,gBAAgB,aAAc;AAElC,UAAM,OAAO,aAAa,aAAa,OAAO;AAC9C,UAAM,YAAY,KAAK,MAAM,8BAA8B;AAC3D,QAAI,CAAC,UAAW;AAEhB,UAAM,cAAc,SAAS,UAAU,CAAC,GAAI,EAAE;AAC9C,QAAI,gBAAgB,WAAY;AAEhC,UAAM,eAAe,KAAK,MAAM,4BAA4B;AAC5D,WAAO,eAAe,CAAC,GAAG,KAAK,KAAK,MAAM,QAAQ,aAAa,EAAE;AAAA,EACnE;AAEA,SAAO;AACT;AAEO,SAAS,mBAAmB,SAAiD;AAClF,QAAM,QAAQ,kBAAkB,QAAQ,EAAE;AAC1C,QAAM,oBAAoB,wBAAwB,QAAQ,IAAI,QAAQ,WAAW;AACjF,MAAI,sBAAsB,MAAM;AAC9B,UAAM,IAAI;AAAA,MACR,QAAQ,OAAO,QAAQ,WAAW,CAAC,mDAAmD,iBAAiB;AAAA,IAEzG;AAAA,EACF;AAEA,YAAU,MAAM,SAAS,EAAE,WAAW,KAAK,CAAC;AAC5C,YAAU,MAAM,UAAU,EAAE,WAAW,KAAK,CAAC;AAE7C,QAAM,YAAY,iBAAiB,OAAO;AAC1C,YAAU,WAAW,EAAE,WAAW,KAAK,CAAC;AAExC,qBAA C:\Users\ai\.codex\skills\memorytree-workflow\SKILL.md:18:5. If `installed`: read the active goal, bound todo, and latest chat log. Report the current state (goal summary, todo progress, pending tasks) and ask the user what they want to work on next. If `memorytree daemon status` shows the heartbeat is not registered, ask the user whether they want the recommended current-repository setup via `memorytree daemon quick-start --root <repo>` or only a machine-level scheduler restore via `memorytree daemon install --interval 5m --auto-push true`. Use `memorytree daemon register` only when they explicitly want custom branch, interval, report-port, or worktree settings. Use plain-text questions compatible with all AI assistants, not client-specific UI components.
C:\Users\ai\.codex\skills\memorytree-workflow\SKILL.md:115:- CLI commands: `memorytree init`, `memorytree upgrade`, `memorytree import`, `memorytree discover`, `memorytree locale`, `memorytree recall`, `memorytree daemon install|uninstall|run-once|watch|status|quick-start|register`.

C:\Users\ai\.codex\skills\memorytree-workflow\README.md:138:- Do not run `quick-start` inside the skill repository unless you intentionally want to register the skill repository itself.
C:\Users\ai\.codex\skills\memorytree-workflow\README.md:139:- `--root` must include a value such as `.` or an absolute path. `memorytree daemon quick-start --root` is incomplete and will fail.

C:\Users\ai\.codex\skills\memorytree-workflow\README.md:273:| Worktree-backed heartbeat | `daemon register` and `daemon quick-start` create an isolated MemoryTree worktree, schedule runs, and keep the shared memory branch plus development cache mirrors in sync |
C:\Users\ai\.codex\skills\memorytree-workflow\README.md:353:memorytree daemon quick-start --root .
C:\Users\ai\.codex\skills\memorytree-workflow\README.md:369:`memorytree daemon install` is the machine-level step, while `memorytree daemon quick-start --root .` is the one-command repository setup. Both are cross-platform; only the initial skill installation differs by OS.

assistant #90 commentary 02:04:56

我已经定位到相关实现了。quick-start 确实会在注册完后主动做一次 ensureBranchUpstream(...)，也就是尝试把 memorytree 分支推到远端并建立 tracking；现在我去看它有没有做“首次推送前检查”和“更清晰报错”的保护。

    .action(async (opts) => {
      const { cmdInit } = await import('./cmd-init.js')
      process.exitCode = cmdInit({
        root: opts.root,
        projectName: opts.projectName,
        goalSummary: opts.goalSummary,
        locale: opts.locale,
        date: opts.date ?? '',

  // ── upgrade ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  
  program
    .command('upgrade')
    .description('Upgrade repository files to MemoryTree without registering heartbeat')
    .option('--root <path>', 'Target repository root', '.')
    .option('--project-name <name>', 'Project name', 'this project')
    .option('--goal-summary <text>', 'Fallback goal summary', 'Describe the long-term project goal here.')
    .option('--locale <locale>', 'Requested locale: auto, en, or zh-cn', 'auto')
    .option('--date <date>', 'Override date as YYYY-MM-DD')
    .option('--time <time>', 'Override time as HH:MM')
    .option('--format <format>', 'Output format: text or json', 'text')
    .addHelpText('after', [
      '',
      'This command updates repository files only.',
>     '  memorytree daemon quick-start --root .',
    ].join('\n'))
    .action(async (opts) => {
      const { cmdUpgrade } = await import('./cmd-upgrade.js')
      process.exitCode = cmdUpgrade({
        root: opts.root,
        projectName: opts.projectName,
        goalSummary: opts.goalSummary,
        locale: opts.locale,
        date: opts.date ?? '',
        time: opts.time ?? '',
        format: opts.format,
      })
    })
  
  // ── import ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  
  program
    .command('import')
    .description('Import one local transcript into MemoryTree archives')
    .requiredOption('--source <path>', 'Raw transcript source file path')
    .option('--root <path>', 'Target repository root', '.')
    .option('--client <client>', 'Transcript client: auto, codex, claude, gemini, doubao', 'auto')
    .option('--project-name <name>', 'Project label', '')
    .option('--global-root <path>', 'Override global transcript root')
    .option('--raw-upload-permission <perm>', 'Permission: not-set, approved, denied', 'not-set')
    .option('--format <format>', 'Output format: text or json', 'text')
    .option('--force-repo', 'Force writing to repo Memory/ (use for external imports like doubao)', false)
    .action(async (opts) => {
      const { cmdImport } = await import('./cmd-import.js')
      process.exitCode = await cmdImport({
>   '    memorytree daemon quick-start --root .',
    '  Run now without waiting:',
    '    memorytree daemon run-once --root . --force',
    '  Advanced setup for the current repository:',
    '    memorytree daemon register --root .',
  ].join('\n')
  
  const daemon = program
    .command('daemon')
    .description('Manage the MemoryTree heartbeat lifecycle')
    .addHelpText('after', daemonHelpExamples)
  
  daemon
    .command('install')
    .description('Register heartbeat with the OS scheduler')
    .option('--interval <interval>', 'Override heartbeat interval (e.g., "5m")')
    .option('--auto-push <bool>', 'Override auto_push setting (true/false)')
    .addHelpText('after', [
      '',
      'Example:',
      '  memorytree daemon install --interval 5m --auto-push true',
      '',
      'Use this once per machine to enable the background scheduler.',
    ].join('\n'))
    .action(async (opts) => {
      const { cmdInstall } = await import('./cmd-daemon.js')
      process.exitCode = cmdInstall({
        interval: opts.interval,
        autoPush: opts.autoPush,
      })
    })
>   .command('quick-start')
    .description('Quick install: connect this repository to heartbeat with the shared memory branch + local cache mirro
r defaults')
>   .option('--root <path>', 'Development directory to quick-start', '.')
    .option('--name <name>', 'Project display name')
    .addHelpText('after', [
      '',
      'Example:',
>     '  memorytree daemon quick-start --root .',
      '',
      'This is the default first-time setup path when you want heartbeat for the current repository.',
      'It keeps the dedicated memorytree branch as the shared source of truth and refreshes this repository as a local 
cache mirror.',
      'Raw transcript mirror commits stay disabled until you explicitly approve them later.',
    ].join('\n'))
    .action(async (opts) => {
      const { cmdQuickStart } = await import('./cmd-daemon.js')
      process.exitCode = await cmdQuickStart({
        root: opts.root,
        name: opts.name,
      })
    })
  
  daemon
    .command('register')
    .description('Advanced heartbeat setup for a repository with a dedicated MemoryTree worktree and local cache mirror
s')
    .option('--root <path>', 'Development directory to register', '.')
    .option('--name <name>', 'Project display name')
    .option('--worktree <path>', 'Override the dedicated MemoryTree worktree path')
>   .option('--quick-start', 'Use the recommended single-source defaults: memorytree branch, 5m heartbeat, auto_push=tr
ue, generate_report=true, raw_upload_permission=not-set')
    .option('--branch <name>', 'Detailed setup only: override the dedicated MemoryTree branch name (default: memorytree
)')
    .option('--heartbeat-interval <interval>', 'Per-project heartbeat interval (e.g. 5m)')
    .option('--auto-push <bool>', 'Per-project auto_push value (true/false)')
    .option('--generate-report <bool>', 'Per-project generate_report value (true/false)')
    .option('--report-port <n>', 'Per-project local report port')
    .option('--raw-upload-permission <perm>', 'Per-project raw transcript mirror commit permission: not-set, approved, 
or denied')
    .addHelpText('after', [
      '',
      'Examples:',
      '  Recommended defaults for the current repository:',
>     '    memorytree daemon register --root . --quick-start',
      '  Advanced setup with custom values:',
      '    memorytree daemon register --root . --branch memorytree-docs --heartbeat-interval 10m --auto-push false --ge
nerate-report true --report-port 10010 --raw-upload-permission approved',
      '',
      'Use this command when you want to choose the branch, heartbeat cadence, auto_push, raw transcript permission, re
port port, or worktree path yourself.',
    ].join('\n'))
    .action(async (opts) => {
      const { cmdRegisterProject } = await import('./cmd-daemon.js')
      process.exitCode = cmdRegisterProject({
        root: opts.root,
        name: opts.name,
        worktree: opts.worktree,
        branch: opts.branch,
        quickStart: opts.quickStart ?? false,
        heartbeatInterval: opts.heartbeatInterval,
        autoPush: opts.autoPush,
        generateReport: opts.generateReport,
        reportPort: opts.reportPort,
        rawUploadPermission: opts.rawUploadPermission,
      })
    })
  
  program.parse()

>     process.stderr.write(`Upstream configured: failed (${upstreamError})

>     process.stdout.write("Upstream configured: skipped (auto_push disabled)\n");

.branch})
  `);

  function parseRawUploadPermissionOption(value) {

  async function cmdQuickStart(options) {

import { existsSync, mkdirSync, realpathSync } from 'node:fs'
import { basename, dirname, isAbsolute, resolve } from 'node:path'
import { platform } from 'node:process'

import type { ProjectEntry } from './config.js'
import { DEFAULT_MEMORY_BRANCH, memorytreeRoot } from './config.js'
import { execCommand, git } from '../utils/exec.js'

export interface WorktreeStatus {
  readonly branch: string
  readonly created: boolean
}

export interface BranchUpstreamStatus {
  readonly remote: string | null
  readonly created: boolean
}

export function defaultProjectWorktreePath(developmentPath: string): string {
  return resolve(memorytreeRoot(), 'worktrees', slugifySegment(basename(resolve(developmentPath))))
}

export function defaultProjectWorktreeBranch(): string {
  return DEFAULT_MEMORY_BRANCH
}

export function resolveProjectWorktreeBranch(project: Pick<ProjectEntry, 'memory_branch'>): string {
  const requested = project.memory_branch.trim()
  return isValidWorktreeBranchName(requested)
    ? requested
    : DEFAULT_MEMORY_BRANCH
}

export function ensureProjectWorktree(project: ProjectEntry): WorktreeStatus {
  const developmentPath = resolve(project.development_path)
  const memoryPath = resolve(project.memory_path)
  if (samePath(developmentPath, memoryPath)) {
    return {
      branch: git(memoryPath, 'rev-parse', '--abbrev-ref', 'HEAD').trim(),
      created: false,
    }
  }

  const repoRoot = git(developmentPath, 'rev-parse', '--show-toplevel').trim()
  const repoCommonDir = gitCommonDir(developmentPath)
  const branch = resolveProjectWorktreeBranch(project)

  if (existsSync(memoryPath)) {
    const existingRoot = execCommand('git', ['rev-parse', '--show-toplevel'], {
      cwd: memoryPath,
      allowFailure: true,
    }).trim()
    if (!existingRoot) {
      throw new Error(`Configured memory_path is not a git worktree: ${memoryPath}`)
    }
    const existingCommonDir = gitCommonDir(memoryPath)
    if (!samePath(existingCommonDir, repoCommonDir)) {
      throw new Error(`Configured memory_path belongs to a different repository: ${memoryPath}`)
    }

    const current = git(memoryPath, 'rev-parse', '--abbrev-ref', 'HEAD').trim()
    if (current !== branch) {
      if (branchExists(repoRoot, branch)) {
        git(memoryPath, 'checkout', branch)
      } else {
        git(memoryPath, 'checkout', '-b', branch)
      }
    }

    return { branch, created: false }
  }

  mkdirSync(dirname(memoryPath), { recursive: true })
  if (branchExists(repoRoot, branch)) {
    git(repoRoot, 'worktree', 'add', memoryPath, branch)
  } else {
    git(repoRoot, 'worktree', 'add', '-b', branch, memoryPath, 'HEAD')
  }

  return { branch, created: true }
}

export function ensureBranchUpstream(projectPath: string, branch: string): BranchUpstreamStatus {
  const remote = resolvePushRemote(projectPath)
  if (remote === null) {
    return { remote: null, created: false }
  }
  if (hasTrackingUpstream(projectPath)) {
    return { remote, created: false }
  }

  git(projectPath, 'push', '-u', remote, branch)
  return { remote, created: true }
}

export function resolvePushRemote(projectPath: string): string | null {
  const remotes = git(projectPath, 'remote')
    .split(/\r?\n/)
    .map(remote => remote.trim())
    .filter(Boolean)

  if (remotes.length === 0) {
    return null
  }
  if (remotes.includes('origin')) {
    return 'origin'
  }
  return remotes[0] ?? null
}

export function hasTrackingUpstream(projectPath: string): boolean {
  const output = execCommand(
    'git',
    ['rev-parse', '--abbrev-ref', '--symbolic-full-name', '@{u}'],
    { cwd: projectPath, allowFailure: true },
  )
  return output.trim().length > 0
}

export function isValidWorktreeBranchName(branch: string): boolean {
  if (!branch || branch.trim() !== branch) {
    return false
  }

  const output = execCommand('git', ['check-ref-format', '--branch', branch], { allowFailure: true })
  return output.trim() === branch
}

export function isProjectMemoryBranch(
  branch: string,
  project?: Pick<ProjectEntry, 'memory_branch'>,
): boolean {
  const normalized = branch.trim()
  if (!normalized) return false

  const expected = project ? resolveProjectWorktreeBranch(project) : DEFAULT_MEMORY_BRANCH
  return normalized === expected
    || normalized === DEFAULT_MEMORY_BRANCH
    || normalized.startsWith(`${DEFAULT_MEMORY_BRANCH}/`)
}

function gitCommonDir(cwd: string): string {
  const output = execCommand('git', ['rev-parse', '--git-common-dir'], {
    cwd,
  }).trim()

  if (!output) {
    throw new Error(`Unable to resolve git common-dir for: ${cwd}`)
  }

  return isAbsolute(output) ? resolve(output) : resolve(cwd, output)
}

function branchExists(repoRoot: string, branch: string): boolean {
  const output = execCommand('git', ['rev-parse', '--verify', `refs/heads/${branch}`], {
    cwd: repoRoot,
    allowFailure: true,
  })
  return output.trim().length > 0
}

function samePath(left: string, right: string): boolean {
  return normalizePath(left) === normalizePath(right)
}

function normalizePath(value: string): string {
  let normalizedPath = resolve(value)
  if (existsSync(normalizedPath)) {
    try {
      normalizedPath = realpathSync.native
        ? realpathSync.native(normalizedPath)
        : realpathSync(normalizedPath)
    } catch {
      // Fall back to the resolved path when realpath fails.
    }
  }

  const normalized = normalizedPath.replace(/\\/g, '/').replace(/\/+$/, '')
  return platform === 'win32' ? normalized.toLowerCase() : normalized
}

function slugifySegment(value: string): string {
  const slug = value
    .trim()
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/[^a-z0-9._-]+/g, '-')
    .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '')
    .replace(/-{2,}/g, '-')

  return slug || 'project'
}

  ```bash

  cd ~/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow
  npm install
  npm run build
  
  ```bash
> memorytree daemon quick-start --root .
  ```
  
> That `quick-start` command is the same on Windows, macOS, and Ubuntu.
  
  End-to-end examples:
  
  
  cd C:\path\to\your-project
> memorytree daemon quick-start --root .
  ```
  
  macOS:
  
  cd ~/path/to/your-project
> memorytree daemon quick-start --root .
  ```
  
  Ubuntu:
  
  cd ~/path/to/your-project
> memorytree daemon quick-start --root .
  ```
  
  Notes:
> - Do not run `quick-start` inside the skill repository unless you intentionally want to register the skill repository
 itself.
> - `--root` must include a value such as `.` or an absolute path. `memorytree daemon quick-start --root` is incomplete
 and will fail.
  
  If the shell says `memorytree` is not recognized, the skill is not on your PATH yet. Go back to the skill repository 
and run `npm link` again, then retry the command.
  
  ```bash
  memorytree upgrade --root . --format json
> memorytree daemon quick-start --root .
  memorytree caddy enable --root .
  ```
  
  Quick Start keeps the dedicated `memorytree` branch as the shared source of truth and refreshes `AGENTS.md` plus `Mem
ory/01_goals` through `Memory/05_archive` into your development directory as local cache mirrors, while `Memory/06_tran
scripts` and `Memory/07_reports` flow back from the memory worktree.
> Its recommended defaults are `memorytree`, `heartbeat_interval = "5m"`, `auto_push = true`, `generate_report = true`,
 and `raw_upload_permission = "not-set"`, so raw transcript mirror commits stay disabled until you explicitly approve t
hem.
  
  Useful day-to-day commands:
  
    Memory/07_reports
          |
>         | mirror matching transcripts, commit/push Memory-only changes,
          | build report output
          v
  Global archive ~/.memorytree/
  | Transcript archive | `discover` scans default client stores, while `import` handles explicit transcript files and m
irrors matching sessions into the repo |
  | Session recall | `recall` runs an on-demand sync and returns the latest prior session for the current repository ac
ross clients |
> | Worktree-backed heartbeat | `daemon register` and `daemon quick-start` create an isolated MemoryTree worktree, sche
dule runs, and keep the shared memory branch plus development cache mirrors in sync |
  | Report generation | `report build` creates a multi-page static site with transcripts, goals, todos, knowledge, arch
ive, projects, graph, search, tags, and RSS |
  | Managed local hosting | `caddy enable|disable|status` writes project-scoped Caddy fragments for long-running local 
report hosting |
  | Git safety | Automatic repo-local commits stay confined to MemoryTree branches and skip raw transcript mirrors unti
l raw uploads are approved |
  
  ```bash
> memorytree report build --root . --no-ai --locale en --report-base-url https://memory.example.com
  ```
  
  Temporary fallback preview:
  
  ```bash
> memorytree daemon quick-start --root .
  ```
  
  Use this as the quick-install path when you want the current repository to join heartbeat with the recommended defaul
ts.
  
  Quick Start keeps the dedicated `memorytree` branch as the shared source of truth and treats your development directo
ry as a local cache mirror.
> Its recommended defaults are `memorytree`, `heartbeat_interval = "5m"`, `auto_push = true`, `generate_report = true`,
 and `raw_upload_permission = "not-set"`.
  
  If you want more control, install the machine scheduler once and then register each repository with your own branch, 
heartbeat cadence, and report settings:
  
  ```bash
> memorytree daemon install --interval 5m --auto-push true
> memorytree daemon register --root . --branch memorytree-docs --heartbeat-interval 10m --auto-push false --generate-re
port true --report-port 10010
  memorytree daemon run-once --root . --force
  ```
  
> `memorytree daemon install` is the machine-level step, while `memorytree daemon quick-start --root .` is the one-comm
and repository setup. Both are cross-platform; only the initial skill installation differs by OS.
  
> If `memorytree` is missing in a fresh shell, fix the skill installation first and then rerun `quick-start`.
  
  The heartbeat now drives both transcript import and cache-mirror refresh timing. `refresh_interval` is no longer part
 of the runtime or config surface.
  
    -> discover and import matching transcripts
    -> build/update Memory/07_reports when report generation is enabled
>   -> commit/push Memory/01-05 changes on the MemoryTree branch when allowed
    -> sync Memory/06_transcripts and Memory/07_reports back to the development directory
    -> release lock
  ```
  - Repo-local transcript mirroring and automatic commits only happen on a dedicated MemoryTree branch.
  - On non-MemoryTree branches, the heartbeat still imports into the global archive but keeps the repository clean.
> - If no Git remote exists, push is skipped and an alert is written.
> - Push failures alert and retry once.
  - Sensitive transcript patterns are logged as warnings only; they are not auto-deleted or auto-redacted.
  
  ## Caddy
  ```toml
  heartbeat_interval = "5m"
> auto_push = true
  log_level = "info"
  generate_report = true
  locale = "en"
  cname = "memory.example.com"
  webhook_url = ""
> report_base_url = "https://memory.example.com"
  report_port = 10010
  report_exposure = "local"
  
  memory_branch = "memorytree"
  heartbeat_interval = "5m"
> auto_push = true
  generate_report = true
  raw_upload_permission = "not-set"
  locale = "en"
  gh_pages_branch = "gh-pages"
> report_base_url = "https://memory.example.com"
  report_port = 10010
  report_exposure = "local"
  ```
  | Scope isolation | Repo mirrors include only the current project's transcripts unless you force a repo-local import 
|
  | Raw upload control | Raw transcript files are not auto-staged until explicitly approved |
> | Push safety | If no remote exists, push is skipped and an alert is written |
> | Failure handling | Push failures alert and retry once; report and webhook failures do not abort the heartbeat cycle
 |
  | Secret scanning | Transcript imports log potential secrets but do not auto-delete or auto-redact them |
  
  ## CLI
  | `memorytree caddy status` | Show whether the current project is connected to MemoryTree-managed Caddy |
  | `memorytree daemon install` | Register the machine-level heartbeat scheduler |
> | `memorytree daemon quick-start` | Quick install: connect the repository to heartbeat with the shared memory branch 
+ local cache mirror defaults |
  | `memorytree daemon register` | Advanced heartbeat setup with custom per-project settings |
  | `memorytree daemon uninstall` | Remove the scheduled heartbeat task |
  | `memorytree daemon run-once` | Execute one heartbeat cycle immediately |

/**
 * CLI: memorytree daemon install|uninstall|run-once|watch|status
 * Port of scripts/memorytree_daemon.py
 */

import { existsSync, mkdirSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, unlinkSync } from 'node:fs'
import { homedir } from 'node:os'
import { basename, dirname, resolve } from 'node:path'
import { platform } from 'node:process'
import { fileURLToPath } from 'node:url'

import {
  DEFAULT_MEMORY_BRANCH,
  DEFAULT_RAW_UPLOAD_PERMISSION,
  configPath,
  findProjectForPath,
  intervalToSeconds,
  loadConfig,
  normalizeRawUploadPermission,
  saveConfig,
  upsertProject,
} from '../heartbeat/config.js'
import { readLockPid } from '../heartbeat/lock.js'
import {
  defaultProjectWorktreePath,
  defaultProjectWorktreeBranch,
  ensureBranchUpstream,
  ensureProjectWorktree,
  isValidWorktreeBranchName,
} from '../heartbeat/worktree.js'
import { execCommand } from '../utils/exec.js'

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Constants
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

const TASK_NAME = 'MemoryTree Heartbeat'
const LAUNCHD_LABEL = 'com.memorytree.heartbeat'
const QUICK_START_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL = '5m'

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Subcommands
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export function cmdInstall(options: { interval?: string; autoPush?: string }): number {
  let config = loadConfig()

  if (options.interval) {
    config = { ...config, heartbeat_interval: options.interval }
  }
  if (options.autoPush) {
    config = { ...config, auto_push: options.autoPush === 'true' }
  }

  saveConfig(config)
  const seconds = intervalToSeconds(config.heartbeat_interval)
  const scriptPath = heartbeatScriptPath()

  const sys = platform
  if (sys === 'linux') return installCron(scriptPath, seconds)
  if (sys === 'darwin') return installLaunchd(scriptPath, seconds)
  if (sys === 'win32') return installSchtasks(scriptPath, seconds)

  process.stderr.write(`Unsupported platform: ${sys}\n`)
  return 1
}

export function cmdUninstall(): number {
  const sys = platform
  if (sys === 'linux') return uninstallCron()
  if (sys === 'darwin') return uninstallLaunchd()
  if (sys === 'win32') return uninstallSchtasks()

  process.stderr.write(`Unsupported platform: ${sys}\n`)
  return 1
}

export async function cmdRunOnce(options: { root?: string; force?: boolean } = {}): Promise<number> {
  const { main } = await import('../heartbeat/heartbeat.js')
  return main(options)
}

export async function cmdWatch(options: { interval?: string }): Promise<number> {
  const config = loadConfig()
  const intervalStr = options.interval ?? config.heartbeat_interval
  const seconds = intervalToSeconds(intervalStr)
  const { main } = await import('../heartbeat/heartbeat.js')

  process.stdout.write(`Watch mode: running heartbeat every ${seconds}s. Press Ctrl+C to stop.\n`)
  try {
    // eslint-disable-next-line no-constant-condition
    while (true) {
      await main()
      await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, seconds * 1000))
    }
  } catch {
    process.stdout.write('\nWatch mode stopped.\n')
  }
  return 0
}

export function cmdStatus(): number {
  const registered = isHeartbeatRegistered()

  const sys = platform
  const platformName = sys === 'darwin' ? 'Darwin' : sys === 'win32' ? 'Windows' : 'Linux'
  process.stdout.write(`Platform:   ${platformName}\n`)
  process.stdout.write(`Registered: ${registered ? 'yes' : 'no'}\n`)

  const pid = readLockPid()
  if (pid !== null) {
    process.stdout.write(`Lock:       held by PID ${pid}\n`)
  } else {
    process.stdout.write('Lock:       not held\n')
  }

  if (existsSync(configPath())) {
    const config = loadConfig()
    process.stdout.write(`Interval:   ${config.heartbeat_interval}\n`)
    process.stdout.write(`Auto-push:  ${config.auto_push}\n`)
    process.stdout.write(`Projects:   ${config.projects.length}\n`)
  } else {
    process.stdout.write('Config:     not found (using defaults)\n')
  }

  return 0
}

export function isHeartbeatRegistered(): boolean {
  const sys = platform
  if (sys === 'linux') return isCronRegistered()
  if (sys === 'darwin') return isLaunchdRegistered()
  if (sys === 'win32') return isSchtasksRegistered()
  return false
}

export function cmdRegisterProject(options: {
  root: string
  name?: string
  worktree?: string
  branch?: string
  quickStart?: boolean
  heartbeatInterval?: string
  autoPush?: string
  generateReport?: string
  reportPort?: string
  rawUploadPermission?: string
}): number {
  const root = resolve(options.root)
  const config = loadConfig()
  const existingProject = findProjectForPath(config, root)

  if (options.quickStart && options.branch !== undefined) {
    process.stderr.write('Quick Start uses the default memorytree branch. Omit --branch to customize it.\n')
    return 1
  }

  const requestedBranch = options.quickStart
    ? existingProject?.memory_branch ?? defaultProjectWorktreeBranch()
    : options.branch ?? existingProject?.memory_branch ?? DEFAULT_MEMORY_BRANCH
  if (!isValidWorktreeBranchName(requestedBranch)) {
    process.stderr.write(`Invalid MemoryTree branch name: ${requestedBranch}\n`)
    return 1
  }

  const heartbeatInterval = options.quickStart
    ? existingProject?.heartbeat_interval ?? QUICK_START_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL
    : options.heartbeatInterval ?? existingProject?.heartbeat_interval ?? config.heartbeat_interval
  const autoPush = options.quickStart
    ? existingProject?.auto_push ?? true
    : parseOptionalBoolean(options.autoPush) ?? existingProject?.auto_push ?? config.auto_push
  const generateReport = options.quickStart
    ? existingProject?.generate_report ?? true
    : parseOptionalBoolean(options.generateReport) ?? existingProject?.generate_report ?? config.generate_report
  const rawUploadPermission = options.quickStart
    ? existingProject?.raw_upload_permission ?? DEFAULT_RAW_UPLOAD_PERMISSION
    : options.rawUploadPermission !== undefined
      ? parseRawUploadPermissionOption(options.rawUploadPermission)
      : existingProject?.raw_upload_permission ?? DEFAULT_RAW_UPLOAD_PERMISSION
  if (rawUploadPermission === null) {
    process.stderr.write('Invalid raw upload permission. Use not-set, approved, or denied.\n')
    return 1
  }

  const requestedPort = options.reportPort ? parseInt(options.reportPort, 10) : NaN
  const reportPort = Number.isInteger(requestedPort) && requestedPort > 0 && requestedPort <= 65535
    ? requestedPort
    : existingProject?.report_port ?? config.report_port

  const updated = upsertProject(config, root, {
    name: options.name ?? existingProject?.name ?? basename(root),
    development_path: root,
    memory_path: options.worktree
      ? resolve(options.worktree)
      : existingProject?.memory_path ?? defaultProjectWorktreePath(root),
    memory_branch: requestedBranch,
    heartbeat_interval: heartbeatInterval,
    auto_push: autoPush,
    generate_report: generateReport,
    report_port: reportPort,
    raw_upload_permission: rawUploadPermission,
  })

  const project = findProjectForPath(updated, root)
  if (!project) {
    process.stderr.write(`Failed to register project: ${root}\n`)
    return 1
  }

  const worktree = ensureProjectWorktree(project)
  saveConfig(updated)
  let upstream: ReturnType<typeof ensureBranchUpstream> | null = null
  let upstreamError = ''
  if (project.auto_push) {
    try {
      upstream = ensureBranchUpstream(project.memory_path, worktree.branch)
    } catch (error: unknown) {
      upstreamError = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
    }
  }

  process.stdout.write(`Registered project: ${project.name}\n`)
  process.stdout.write(`Development path: ${project.development_path}\n`)
  process.stdout.write(`Memory path: ${project.memory_path}\n`)
  process.stdout.write(`Memory branch: ${project.memory_branch}\n`)
  process.stdout.write(`Heartbeat interval: ${project.heartbeat_interval}\n`)
  process.stdout.write(`Auto-push: ${project.auto_push}\n`)
  process.stdout.write(`Generate report: ${project.generate_report}\n`)
  process.stdout.write(`Raw upload permission: ${project.raw_upload_permission}\n`)
  process.stdout.write(`Worktree branch: ${worktree.branch}\n`)
  process.stdout.write(`Worktree created: ${worktree.created ? 'yes' : 'no'}\n`)
  if (upstreamError) {
    process.stderr.write(`Upstream configured: failed (${upstreamError})\n`)
  } else if (upstream === null) {
    process.stdout.write('Upstream configured: skipped (auto_push disabled)\n')
  } else if (upstream.remote === null) {
    process.stdout.write('Upstream configured: no remote available\n')
  } else {
    process.stdout.write(`Upstream configured: ${upstream.created ? 'yes' : 'already'} (${upstream.remote}/${worktree.branch})\n`)
  }
  return upstreamError ? 1 : 0
}

function parseRawUploadPermissionOption(value: string): 'not-set' | 'approved' | 'denied' | null {
  const normalized = normalizeRawUploadPermission(value, DEFAULT_RAW_UPLOAD_PERMISSION)
  return normalized === DEFAULT_RAW_UPLOAD_PERMISSION && value.trim().toLowerCase() !== DEFAULT_RAW_UPLOAD_PERMISSION
    ? null
    : normalized
}

export async function cmdQuickStart(options: {
  root: string
  name?: string
}): Promise<number> {
  const root = resolve(options.root)
  const config = loadConfig()
  const quickStartSeconds = intervalToSeconds(QUICK_START_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL)
  const schedulerIntervalSeconds = registeredHeartbeatIntervalSeconds()
  const effectiveSchedulerSeconds = schedulerIntervalSeconds ?? intervalToSeconds(config.heartbeat_interval)
  const effectiveSchedulerLabel = schedulerIntervalSeconds === null
    ? config.heartbeat_interval
    : formatIntervalSeconds(schedulerIntervalSeconds)

  process.stdout.write('Quick Start: prepare scheduler, register this repository in the single-source memory flow, and run one sync now.\n')

  if (!isHeartbeatRegistered()) {
    process.stdout.write('Step 1/3: installing heartbeat scheduler with recommended defaults.\n')
    const installResult = cmdInstall({ interval: QUICK_START_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL, autoPush: 'true' })
    if (installResult !== 0) {
      return installResult
    }
  } else if (effectiveSchedulerSeconds > quickStartSeconds) {
    process.stdout.write(
      `Step 1/3: heartbeat scheduler is registered at ${effectiveSchedulerLabel}; ` +
      `reinstalling it to ${QUICK_START_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL} so Quick Start can run on time.\n`,
    )
    const uninstallResult = cmdUninstall()
    if (uninstallResult !== 0) {
      return uninstallResult
    }

    const installResult = cmdInstall({
      interval: QUICK_START_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL,
      autoPush: config.auto_push ? 'true' : 'false',
    })
    if (installResult !== 0) {
      return installResult
    }
  } else {
    process.stdout.write(
      `Step 1/3: heartbeat scheduler already registered at ${effectiveSchedulerLabel}; keeping the existing install.\n`,
    )
  }

  process.stdout.write('Step 2/3: registering the current repository with Quick Start settings.\n')
  const registerOptions: Parameters<typeof cmdRegisterProject>[0] = {
    root,
    quickStart: true,
  }
  if (options.name !== undefined) {
    registerOptions.name = options.name
  }

  const registerResult = cmdRegisterProject(registerOptions)
  if (registerResult !== 0) {
    return registerResult
  }

  process.stdout.write('Step 3/3: running one immediate heartbeat sync.\n')
  return await cmdRunOnce({
    root,
    force: true,
  })
}

export function registeredHeartbeatIntervalSeconds(): number | null {
  const sys = platform
  if (sys === 'linux') return cronRegisteredIntervalSeconds()
  if (sys === 'darwin') return launchdRegisteredIntervalSeconds()
  if (sys === 'win32') return schtasksRegisteredIntervalSeconds()
  return null
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Linux (cron)
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

function installCron(scriptPath: string, seconds: number): number {
  if (isCronRegistered()) {
    process.stderr.write("Heartbeat is already registered in cron. Use 'uninstall' first.\n")
    return 1
  }

  const minutes = Math.max(1, Math.floor(seconds / 60))
  const logDir = resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree', 'logs')
  mkdirSync(logDir, { recursive: true })

  const cronLine = `*/${minutes} * * * * node "${scriptPath}" daemon run-once >> "${resolve(logDir, 'heartbeat-cron.log')}" 2>&1 # memorytree`
  const existing = getCrontab()
  const newCrontab = existing.trim()
    ? existing.trimEnd() + '\n' + cronLine + '\n'
    : cronLine + '\n'

  try {
    const tmpFile = resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree', '.crontab.tmp')
    writeFileSync(tmpFile, newCrontab)
    execCommand('crontab', [tmpFile])
    unlinkSync(tmpFile)
  } catch {
    process.stderr.write('Failed to install cron job.\n')
    return 1
  }

  process.stdout.write(`Heartbeat registered in cron (every ${minutes}m).\n`)
  return 0
}

function uninstallCron(): number {
  const existing = getCrontab()
  const filtered = existing.split('\n').filter(line => !line.includes('memorytree')).join('\n') + '\n'
  try {
    const tmpFile = resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree', '.crontab.tmp')
    mkdirSync(dirname(tmpFile), { recursive: true })
    writeFileSync(tmpFile, filtered)
    execCommand('crontab', [tmpFile])
    unlinkSync(tmpFile)
  } catch {
    // best effort
  }
  process.stdout.write('Heartbeat removed from cron.\n')
  return 0
}

export function isCronRegistered(): boolean {
  return getCrontab().includes('memorytree')
}

function getCrontab(): string {
  try {
    return execCommand('crontab', ['-l'], { allowFailure: true })
  } catch {
    return ''
  }
}

function cronRegisteredIntervalSeconds(): number | null {
  const line = getCrontab()
    .split(/\r?\n/)
    .find(candidate => candidate.includes('memorytree'))
  if (!line) return null

  const match = line.match(/^\*\/(\d+)\s+\*\s+\*\s+\*\s+\*.*#\s*memorytree\s*$/)
  if (!match) return null

  const minutes = parseInt(match[1]!, 10)
  return Number.isInteger(minutes) && minutes > 0 ? minutes * 60 : null
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// macOS (launchd)
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

function launchdPlistPath(): string {
  return resolve(homedir(), 'Library', 'LaunchAgents', `${LAUNCHD_LABEL}.plist`)
}

function installLaunchd(scriptPath: string, seconds: number): number {
  const plistPath = launchdPlistPath()
  if (existsSync(plistPath)) {
    process.stderr.write("Heartbeat plist already exists. Use 'uninstall' first.\n")
    return 1
  }

  const logDir = resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree', 'logs')
  mkdirSync(logDir, { recursive: true })

  const plistContent = `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
<plist version="1.0">
<dict>
    <key>Label</key>
    <string>${LAUNCHD_LABEL}</string>
    <key>ProgramArguments</key>
    <array>
        <string>node</string>
        <string>${scriptPath}</string>
        <string>daemon</string>
        <string>run-once</string>
    </array>
    <key>StartInterval</key>
    <integer>${seconds}</integer>
    <key>StandardOutPath</key>
    <string>${resolve(logDir, 'heartbeat-launchd.log')}</string>
    <key>StandardErrorPath</key>
    <string>${resolve(logDir, 'heartbeat-launchd.log')}</string>
</dict>
</plist>
`
  mkdirSync(dirname(plistPath), { recursive: true })
  writeFileSync(plistPath, plistContent, 'utf-8')

  try {
    execCommand('launchctl', ['load', plistPath])
  } catch {
    process.stderr.write('Failed to load plist.\n')
    return 1
  }

  process.stdout.write(`Heartbeat registered via launchd (every ${seconds}s).\n`)
  return 0
}

function uninstallLaunchd(): number {
  const plistPath = launchdPlistPath()
  if (existsSync(plistPath)) {
    try { execCommand('launchctl', ['unload', plistPath], { allowFailure: true }) } catch { /* ignore */ }
    try { unlinkSync(plistPath) } catch { /* ignore */ }
  }
  process.stdout.write('Heartbeat removed from launchd.\n')
  return 0
}

export function isLaunchdRegistered(): boolean {
  return existsSync(launchdPlistPath())
}

function launchdRegisteredIntervalSeconds(): number | null {
  const plistPath = launchdPlistPath()
  if (!existsSync(plistPath)) return null

  try {
    const text = readFileSync(plistPath, 'utf-8')
    const match = text.match(/<key>StartInterval<\/key>\s*<integer>(\d+)<\/integer>/i)
    if (!match) return null

    const seconds = parseInt(match[1]!, 10)
    return Number.isInteger(seconds) && seconds > 0 ? seconds : null
  } catch {
    return null
  }
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Windows (Task Scheduler)
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

// Write a VBScript launcher that runs node silently (no console window).
// wscript.exe /B runs in batch mode (suppresses script error popups).
// VBScript Run(..., 0, False): 0 = SW_HIDE hides the window; False = fire-and-forget.
// Written as UTF-16 LE with BOM so wscript.exe handles non-ASCII paths (e.g. Chinese
// usernames) correctly on all Windows versions.
export function vbsLauncherPath(): string {
  return resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree', 'heartbeat-launcher.vbs')
}

export function writeVbsLauncher(scriptPath: string): string {
  const vbsPath = vbsLauncherPath()
  mkdirSync(dirname(vbsPath), { recursive: true })
  // Inside VBScript strings, double-quote is escaped as ""
  const escapedScript = scriptPath.replace(/"/g, '""')
  // Use the full node binary path so the launcher works even when Task Scheduler's
  // PATH differs from the user's shell (e.g. nvm/fnm environments).
  const escapedNode = process.execPath.replace(/"/g, '""')
  const content = [
    'Set WshShell = CreateObject("WScript.Shell")',
    `WshShell.Run """${escapedNode}"" ""${escapedScript}"" daemon run-once", 0, False`,
  ].join('\r\n') + '\r\n'
  // UTF-16 LE BOM: recognised by wscript.exe on all Windows versions and preserves
  // non-ASCII characters (e.g. Chinese home directory paths) without corruption.
  const buf = Buffer.concat([Buffer.from([0xff, 0xfe]), Buffer.from(content, 'utf16le')])
  writeFileSync(vbsPath, buf)
  return vbsPath
}

function installSchtasks(scriptPath: string, seconds: number): number {
  if (isSchtasksRegistered()) {
    process.stderr.write("Heartbeat is already registered in Task Scheduler. Use 'uninstall' first.\n")
    return 1
  }

  const minutes = Math.max(1, Math.floor(seconds / 60))
  const vbsPath = writeVbsLauncher(scriptPath)
  const trCommand = `wscript.exe /B "${vbsPath}"`

  try {
    execCommand('schtasks', [
      '/create', '/tn', TASK_NAME, '/sc', 'minute', '/mo', String(minutes),
      '/tr', trCommand, '/f',
    ])
  } catch {
    // schtasks failed — remove the launcher file we just wrote to keep state clean
    try { unlinkSync(vbsPath) } catch { /* ignore */ }
    process.stderr.write('Failed to create scheduled task.\n')
    return 1
  }

  process.stdout.write(`Heartbeat registered in Task Scheduler (every ${minutes}m).\n`)
  return 0
}

function uninstallSchtasks(): number {
  try {
    execCommand('schtasks', ['/delete', '/tn', TASK_NAME, '/f'], { allowFailure: true })
  } catch {
    // best effort
  }
  const vbsPath = vbsLauncherPath()
  if (existsSync(vbsPath)) {
    try { unlinkSync(vbsPath) } catch { /* ignore */ }
  }
  process.stdout.write('Heartbeat removed from Task Scheduler.\n')
  return 0
}

export function isSchtasksRegistered(): boolean {
  try {
    execCommand('schtasks', ['/query', '/tn', TASK_NAME])
    return true
  } catch {
    return false
  }
}

function schtasksRegisteredIntervalSeconds(): number | null {
  try {
    const xml = execCommand('schtasks', ['/query', '/tn', TASK_NAME, '/xml'], { allowFailure: true })
    if (!xml.trim()) return null

    const match = xml.match(/<Interval>([^<]+)<\/Interval>/i)
    if (!match) return null

    return parseIsoDurationToSeconds(match[1]!)
  } catch {
    return null
  }
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Helpers
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export function heartbeatScriptPath(): string {
  // Use process.argv[1] which is the actual script being executed,
  // more reliable than import.meta.url which varies between tsx and bundled output
  const scriptArg = process.argv[1] ?? ''
  if (scriptArg && scriptArg.endsWith('cli.js')) {
    return resolve(scriptArg)
  }
  return fallbackHeartbeatScriptPath(import.meta.url)
}

export function fallbackHeartbeatScriptPath(moduleUrl: string): string {
  const moduleDir = dirname(fileURLToPath(moduleUrl))
  if (basename(moduleDir).toLowerCase() === 'dist') {
    return resolve(moduleDir, 'cli.js')
  }
  return resolve(moduleDir, '..', '..', 'dist', 'cli.js')
}

function parseOptionalBoolean(value: string | undefined): boolean | undefined {
  if (value === undefined) return undefined
  if (value === 'true') return true
  if (value === 'false') return false
  return undefined
}

function parseIsoDurationToSeconds(value: string): number | null {
  const match = value.trim().match(/^P(?:(\d+)D)?(?:T(?:(\d+)H)?(?:(\d+)M)?(?:(\d+)S)?)?$/i)
  if (!match) return null

  const days = parseInt(match[1] ?? '0', 10)
  const hours = parseInt(match[2] ?? '0', 10)
  const minutes = parseInt(match[3] ?? '0', 10)
  const seconds = parseInt(match[4] ?? '0', 10)
  const total = (days * 86400) + (hours * 3600) + (minutes * 60) + seconds
  return total > 0 ? total : null
}

function formatIntervalSeconds(seconds: number): string {
  if (seconds % 3600 === 0) return `${String(seconds / 3600)}h`
  if (seconds % 60 === 0) return `${String(seconds / 60)}m`
  return `${String(seconds)}s`
}

assistant #114 commentary 02:05:24

实现层已经很明确了：cmdRegisterProject() 里在 auto_push=true 时直接调 ensureBranchUpstream()，而 ensureBranchUpstream() 只是找 remote 然后跑 git push -u。也就是说，它现在没有做 SSH host key、push URL 方案、首次 push 连通性这类预判。
