Using Node v20.20.1
 140: export function pushBranchToRemote(projectPath: string, branch: string): BranchPushStatus {
 141:   const remote = resolveTrackingRemote(projectPath) ?? resolvePushRemote(projectPath)
 142:   const target = describePushRemote(projectPath, remote ?? undefined)
 143:   if (target.remote === null || target.pushUrl === null || target.transport === null) {
 144:     return {
 145:       remote: null,
 146:       pushUrl: null,
 147:       transport: null,
 148:       usedFallback: false,
 149:     }
 150:   }
 151: 
 152:   const resolvedTarget = {
 153:     ...target,
 154:     remote: target.remote,
 155:     pushUrl: target.pushUrl,
 156:     transport: target.transport,
 157:   }
 158:   return pushToResolvedRemote(projectPath, branch, resolvedTarget, false)
 250: function resolveTrackingRemote(projectPath: string): string | null {
 251:   const upstream = execCommand(
 252:     'git',
 253:     ['rev-parse', '--abbrev-ref', '--symbolic-full-name', '@{u}'],
 254:     { cwd: projectPath, allowFailure: true },
 255:   ).trim()
 256:   if (!upstream) {
 257:     return null
 258:   }
 259: 
 260:   const slashIndex = upstream.indexOf('/')
 261:   return slashIndex <= 0 ? null : upstream.slice(0, slashIndex)
 262: }
 263: 
 264: function pushToResolvedRemote(
 265:   projectPath: string,
 266:   branch: string,
 267:   target: PushRemoteStatus & { remote: string; pushUrl: string; transport: PushTransport },
 268:   setUpstream: boolean,
 269: ): BranchPushStatus {
 270:   const pushArgs = setUpstream
 271:     ? ['push', '-u', target.remote, branch]
 272:     : ['push', target.remote, branch]
 273: 
 274:   try {
 275:     git(projectPath, ...pushArgs)
 276:     return {
 277:       remote: target.remote,
 278:       pushUrl: target.pushUrl,
 279:       transport: target.transport,
 280:       usedFallback: false,
 281:     }
 282:   } catch (primaryError: unknown) {
 283:     if (shouldTryFallbackTransport(primaryError, target.fallbackUrls)) {
 284:       let lastFallbackFailure: { url: string; error: unknown } | null = null
 285:       for (const fallbackUrl of target.fallbackUrls) {
 286:         try {
 287:           execCommand(
 288:             'git',
 289:             ['-c', `remote.${target.remote}.pushurl=${fallbackUrl}`, ...pushArgs],
 290:             { cwd: projectPath },
 291:           )
 292:           return {
 293:             remote: target.remote,
 294:             pushUrl: fallbackUrl,
 295:             transport: detectPushTransport(fallbackUrl),
 296:             usedFallback: true,
 297:           }
 298:         } catch (fallbackError: unknown) {
 299:           lastFallbackFailure = {
 300:             url: fallbackUrl,
 301:             error: fallbackError,
 302:           }
 303:         }
 304:       }
 305:       if (lastFallbackFailure !== null) {
 306:         throw new Error(
 307:           formatPushFailure(
 308:             target.remote,
 309:             target.pushUrl,
 310:             primaryError,
 311:             lastFallbackFailure.url,
 312:             lastFallbackFailure.error,
 313:           ),
 314:         )
 315:       }
 316:     }
 317: 
 318:     throw new Error(formatPushFailure(target.remote, target.pushUrl, primaryError))
 319:   }
 320: }
 425: function formatPushFailure(
 426:   remote: string,
 427:   pushUrl: string,
 428:   primaryError: unknown,
 429:   fallbackUrl?: string,
 430:   fallbackError?: unknown,
 431: ): string {
 432:   const lines = [
 433:     `Unable to push branch to remote '${remote}'.`,
 434:     `Primary push URL: ${pushUrl}`,
 435:     `Primary error: ${summarizeError(primaryError)}`,
 436:   ]
 437: 
 438:   if (fallbackUrl) {
 439:     lines.push(`Fallback push URL: ${fallbackUrl}`)
 440:     if (fallbackError) {
 441:       lines.push(`Fallback error: ${summarizeError(fallbackError)}`)
 442:     }
 443:   }
 444: 
 445:   return lines.join('\n')

assistant #317 final_answer 02:27:52

**Findings** - 高: 新增的诊断输出会直接泄露带凭据的 remote URL。`cmdRegisterProject()` 现在会把 `Push URL` 和 `Push fallback used` 原样打印出来，[cmd-daemon.ts#L234](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/cmd-daemon.ts#L234) [cmd-d...

Expand full message

Findings
- 高: 新增的诊断输出会直接泄露带凭据的 remote URL。cmdRegisterProject() 现在会把 Push URL 和 Push fallback used 原样打印出来，[cmd-daemon.ts#L234](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/cmd-daemon.ts#L234) [cmd-daemon.ts#L247](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/cmd-daemon.ts#L247)；失败路径也会把 primary/fallback URL 原样拼进异常消息，[worktree.ts#L433](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/worktree.ts#L433) [worktree.ts#L439](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/worktree.ts#L439)。如果用户的 HTTPS push URL 是 https://user:token@host/repo.git 这种形式，这次改动会把 token 打进终端、日志和会话归档，属于新的凭据暴露面。这里至少需要先做 userinfo 脱敏，再决定是否显示完整 URL。
- 中: 已有 tracking upstream 的分支现在不再按“配置的 upstream ref”推送，而是强行按“本地分支名”推送。tryPush() 在有 upstream 时改成调用 pushBranchToRemote(projectPath, branch)，[heartbeat.ts#L346](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts#L346)；而 pushBranchToRemote() 只解析 remote 名称，[worktree.ts#L140](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/worktree.ts#L140) [worktree.ts#L250](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/worktree.ts#L250)，最后执行的是 git push <remote> <local-branch>，[worktree.ts#L270](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/worktree.ts#L270)。如果本地 memorytree 跟踪的是一个不同名字的远端分支，这里会把内容推到错误的 ref。原来的 git push 会尊重现有 upstream 配置；这次属于行为回归，而且当前测试也没覆盖“upstream 分支名不同于本地分支名”的情况。

Assumptions
- 我按“两轮 review”看了这组改动，重点检查了安全输出和 fallback/push 语义。
- 第二个问题成立的前提是仓库允许“本地分支名”和“tracking upstream ref 名”不一致；如果项目明确永远同名，风险会下降，但代码层面仍是语义收窄。

Summary
- 这版改动的方向是对的，尤其是自动建 memorytree 分支和 SSH/HTTPS fallback。
- 但在可合入前，我建议先修掉“URL 凭据泄露”和“tracked upstream 被忽略”这两个点。

- 高: 新增的诊断输出会直接泄露带凭据的 remote URL。cmdRegisterProject() 现在会把 Push URL 和 Push fallback used 原样打印出来，[cmd-daemon.ts#L234](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/cmd-daemon.ts#L234) [cmd-daemon.ts#L247](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/cmd-daemon.ts#L247)；失败路径也会把 primary/fallback URL 原样拼进异常消息，[worktree.ts#L433](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/worktree.ts#L433) [worktree.ts#L439](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/worktree.ts#L439)。如果用户的 HTTPS push URL 是 https://user:token@host/repo.git 这种形式，这次改动会把 token 打进终端、日志和会话归档，属于新的凭据暴露面。这里至少需要先做 userinfo 脱敏，再决定是否显示完整 URL。
- 中: 已有 tracking upstream 的分支现在不再按“配置的 upstream ref”推送，而是强行按“本地分支名”推送。tryPush() 在有 upstream 时改成调用 pushBranchToRemote(projectPath, branch)，[heartbeat.ts#L346](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts#L346)；而 pushBranchToRemote() 只解析 remote 名称，[worktree.ts#L140](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/worktree.ts#L140) [worktree.ts#L250](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/worktree.ts#L250)，最后执行的是 git push <remote> <local-branch>，[worktree.ts#L270](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/worktree.ts#L270)。如果本地 memorytree 跟踪的是一个不同名字的远端分支，这里会把内容推到错误的 ref。原来的 git push 会尊重现有 upstream 配置；这次属于行为回归，而且当前测试也没覆盖“upstream 分支名不同于本地分支名”的情况。

Assumptions
- 我按“两轮 review”看了这组改动，重点检查了安全输出和 fallback/push 语义。
- 第二个问题成立的前提是仓库允许“本地分支名”和“tracking upstream ref 名”不一致；如果项目明确永远同名，风险会下降，但代码层面仍是语义收窄。

Summary
- 这版改动的方向是对的，尤其是自动建 memorytree 分支和 SSH/HTTPS fallback。
- 但在可合入前，我建议先修掉“URL 凭据泄露”和“tracked upstream 被忽略”这两个点。

Tool Call #328 apply_patch call_fYRRZkzgD43ifs31EVO0iGov 02:29:53
apply_patch input=*** Begin Patch *** Update File: C:\Users\ai\.codex\skills\memorytree-workflow\src\heartbeat\worktree.ts @@ export interface BranchPushStatus { readonly remote: string | null re...
Show input payload 
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: C:\Users\ai\.codex\skills\memorytree-workflow\src\heartbeat\worktree.ts
@@
 export interface BranchPushStatus {
   readonly remote: string | null
   readonly pushUrl: string | null
   readonly transport: PushTransport | null
   readonly usedFallback: boolean
 }
+
+export function redactRemoteUrl(url: string | null): string | null {
+  if (url === null) {
+    return null
+  }
+
+  const trimmed = url.trim()
+  if (!trimmed) {
+    return trimmed
+  }
+
+  try {
+    const parsed = new URL(trimmed)
+    const keepPlainUser = parsed.protocol === 'ssh:' && !parsed.password && parsed.username === 'git'
+    if (parsed.username && !keepPlainUser) {
+      parsed.username = '***'
+      parsed.password = ''
+    }
+    return parsed.toString()
+  } catch {
+    return trimmed.replace(/(https?:\/\/)([^/\s@]+)@/gi, '$1***@')
+  }
+}
@@
-  const pushed = pushToResolvedRemote(projectPath, branch, resolvedTarget, true)
+  const pushed = pushToResolvedRemote(projectPath, resolvedTarget, ['push', '-u', resolvedTarget.remote, branch])
@@
 export function pushBranchToRemote(projectPath: string, branch: string): BranchPushStatus {
-  const remote = resolveTrackingRemote(projectPath) ?? resolvePushRemote(projectPath)
+  const trackingRemote = resolveTrackingRemote(projectPath)
+  const remote = trackingRemote ?? resolvePushRemote(projectPath)
   const target = describePushRemote(projectPath, remote ?? undefined)
   if (target.remote === null || target.pushUrl === null || target.transport === null) {
     return {
       remote: null,
       pushUrl: null,
@@
     remote: target.remote,
     pushUrl: target.pushUrl,
     transport: target.transport,
   }
-  return pushToResolvedRemote(projectPath, branch, resolvedTarget, false)
+  const pushArgs = trackingRemote !== null
+    ? ['push']
+    : ['push', resolvedTarget.remote, branch]
+  return pushToResolvedRemote(projectPath, resolvedTarget, pushArgs)
 }
@@
 function pushToResolvedRemote(
   projectPath: string,
-  branch: string,
   target: PushRemoteStatus & { remote: string; pushUrl: string; transport: PushTransport },
-  setUpstream: boolean,
+  pushArgs: string[],
 ): BranchPushStatus {
-  const pushArgs = setUpstream
-    ? ['push', '-u', target.remote, branch]
-    : ['push', target.remote, branch]
-
   try {
     git(projectPath, ...pushArgs)
     return {
       remote: target.remote,
       pushUrl: target.pushUrl,
@@
 function formatPushFailure(
   remote: string,
   pushUrl: string,
   primaryError: unknown,
   fallbackUrl?: string,
@@
 ): string {
   const lines = [
     `Unable to push branch to remote '${remote}'.`,
-    `Primary push URL: ${pushUrl}`,
+    `Primary push URL: ${redactRemoteUrl(pushUrl)}`,
     `Primary error: ${summarizeError(primaryError)}`,
   ]
 
   if (fallbackUrl) {
-    lines.push(`Fallback push URL: ${fallbackUrl}`)
+    lines.push(`Fallback push URL: ${redactRemoteUrl(fallbackUrl)}`)
     if (fallbackError) {
       lines.push(`Fallback error: ${summarizeError(fallbackError)}`)
     }
   }
@@
 function summarizeError(error: unknown): string {
-  const lines = collectErrorText(error)
+  const lines = redactRemoteUrlsInText(collectErrorText(error))
     .split(/\r?\n/)
     .map(line => line.trim())
     .filter(Boolean)
@@
 function bufferToString(value: string | Buffer): string {
   return typeof value === 'string' ? value : value.toString('utf-8')
 }
 
+function redactRemoteUrlsInText(value: string): string {
+  return value.replace(/(https?:\/\/)([^/\s@]+)@/gi, '$1***@')
+}
+
 function normalizeComparableUrl(value: string): string {
   return value.trim().replace(/\/+$/, '').toLowerCase()
 }

assistant #342 commentary 02:30:13

我在补两条针对性测试：一条锁住“已有 upstream 时用 plain git push”，另一条锁住“CLI 输出不暴露 token”。这样这次修复不会只停留在实现里。

Tool Call #343 apply_patch call_UnFw3G7K9Sj57OMzTJdoOjGJ 02:30:24
apply_patch input=*** Begin Patch *** Update File: C:\Users\ai\.codex\skills\memorytree-workflow\tests\heartbeat\worktree.test.ts @@ describe('ensureBranchUpstream', () => { @@ }) }) + +describe(...
Show input payload 
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: C:\Users\ai\.codex\skills\memorytree-workflow\tests\heartbeat\worktree.test.ts
@@
 describe('ensureBranchUpstream', () => {
@@
   })
 })
+
+describe('pushBranchToRemote', () => {
+  it('preserves the existing tracking upstream semantics by using plain git push', async () => {
+    const gitMock = vi.fn((cwd: string, ...args: string[]) => {
+      if (cwd !== developmentPath) {
+        throw new Error(`Unexpected cwd: ${cwd}`)
+      }
+      if (args[0] === 'push') {
+        return ''
+      }
+      if (args[0] === 'remote') {
+        return 'origin\n'
+      }
+      throw new Error(`Unexpected git call: ${args.join(' ')}`)
+    })
+
+    vi.doMock('../../src/utils/exec.js', () => ({
+      git: gitMock,
+      execCommand: (_command: string, args: string[], options?: { cwd?: string; allowFailure?: boolean }) => {
+        if (options?.cwd !== developmentPath) {
+          throw new Error(`Unexpected cwd: ${options?.cwd}`)
+        }
+        if (args[0] === 'rev-parse' && args[1] === '--abbrev-ref' && args[2] === '--symbolic-full-name') {
+          return 'origin/memorytree-remote\n'
+        }
+        if (args[0] === 'remote' && args[1] === 'get-url' && args[2] === 'origin') {
+          return 'https://github.com/example/repo.git\n'
+        }
+        if (args[0] === 'remote' && args[1] === 'get-url' && args[2] === '--push' && args[3] === 'origin') {
+          return 'https://github.com/example/repo.git\n'
+        }
+        throw new Error(`Unexpected execCommand call: ${args.join(' ')}`)
+      },
+    }))
+
+    const { pushBranchToRemote } = await import('../../src/heartbeat/worktree.js')
+
+    const result = pushBranchToRemote(developmentPath, 'memorytree')
+
+    expect(result).toEqual({
+      remote: 'origin',
+      pushUrl: 'https://github.com/example/repo.git',
+      transport: 'https',
+      usedFallback: false,
+    })
+    expect(gitMock).toHaveBeenCalledWith(developmentPath, 'push')
+    expect(gitMock).not.toHaveBeenCalledWith(developmentPath, 'push', 'origin', 'memorytree')
+  })
+})
*** End Patch

+
+  it('redacts credentials in displayed push URLs', async () => {
+    const savedConfigs: unknown[] = []
+    const upserted = {
+      heartbeat_interval: '5m',
+      auto_push: true,
+      log_level: 'info',
+      watch_dirs: [],
+      generate_report: false,
+      ai_summary_model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001',

+        {
+          id: 'repo',
+          path: '/memorytree/worktrees/repo',
+          name: 'repo',
+          development_path: '/repo',
+          memory_path: '/memorytree/worktrees/repo',
+          memory_branch: 'memorytree',
+          heartbeat_interval: '5m',
+          auto_push: true,
+          generate_report: true,
+          ai_summary_model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001',
+          locale: 'en',
+          gh_pages_branch: '',
+          cname: '',
+          webhook_url: '',
+          report_base_url: '',
+          report_port: 10010,
+          last_heartbeat_at: '',
+        },
+      ],
+    }
+
+    vi.doMock('../../src/heartbeat/config.js', () => ({
+      DEFAULT_MEMORY_BRANCH: 'memorytree',
+      DEFAULT_RAW_UPLOAD_PERMISSION: 'not-set',
+      normalizeRawUploadPermission: mockNormalizeRawUploadPermission,
+      configPath: () => '/nonexistent/config.toml',
+      loadConfig: () => ({
+        heartbeat_interval: '9m',
+        auto_push: false,
+        projects: [],
+        watch_dirs: [],
+        log_level: 'info',
+        generate_report: false,
+        ai_summary_model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001',
+        locale: 'en',
+        gh_pages_branch: '',
+        cname: '',
+        webhook_url: '',
+        report_base_url: '',
+        report_port: 10010,
+      }),
+      saveConfig: (cfg: unknown) => { savedConfigs.push(cfg) },
+      intervalToSeconds: () => 300,
+      findProjectForPath: () => upserted.projects[0],
+      upsertProject: () => upserted,
+    }))
+    vi.doMock('../../src/heartbeat/lock.js', () => ({
+      readLockPid: () => null,
+    }))
+    vi.doMock('../../src/heartbeat/worktree.js', () => ({
+      describePushRemote: () => ({
+        remote: 'origin',
+        fetchUrl: 'https://x-access-token:super-secret-token@github.com/example/repo.git',
+        pushUrl: 'https://x-access-token:super-secret-token@github.com/example/repo.git',
+        transport: 'https',
+        fallbackUrls: ['ssh://git@ssh.github.com:443/example/repo.git'],
+      }),
+      defaultProjectWorktreePath: () => '/memorytree/worktrees/repo',
+      defaultProjectWorktreeBranch: () => 'memorytree',
+      ensureBranchUpstream: () => ({
+        remote: 'origin',
+        created: true,
+        pushUrl: 'https://x-access-token:super-secret-token@github.com/example/repo.git',
+        transport: 'https',
+        usedFallback: false,
+      }),
+      ensureProjectWorktree: () => ({ branch: 'memorytree', created: true }),
+      isValidWorktreeBranchName: () => true,
+      redactRemoteUrl: (value: string | null) => value?.replace('x-access-token:super-secret-token@', '***@') ?? value,
+    }))
+    vi.doMock('../../src/utils/exec.js', () => ({
+      execCommand: () => '',
+    }))
+
+    const mod = await import('../../src/cli/cmd-daemon.js')
+    const result = mod.cmdRegisterProject({
+      root: '/repo',
+      quickStart: true,
+    })
+
+    expect(result).toBe(0)
+    expect(savedConfigs).toHaveLength(1)
+    expect(stdoutChunks.join('')).toContain('Push URL: https://***@github.com/example/repo.git')
+    expect(stdoutChunks.join('')).not.toContain('super-secret-token')
+  })

Show input payload 
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: C:\Users\ai\.codex\skills\memorytree-workflow\tests\heartbeat\worktree.test.ts
@@
 describe('ensureBranchUpstream', () => {
@@
   it('reports both the primary and fallback push failures when fallback also fails', async () => {
@@
     expect((thrown as Error).message).toContain('Authentication failed for https://github.com/example/repo.git')
   })
+
+  it('redacts credentials from failure details', async () => {
+    vi.doMock('../../src/utils/exec.js', () => ({
+      git: (cwd: string, ...args: string[]) => {
+        if (cwd !== developmentPath) {
+          throw new Error(`Unexpected cwd: ${cwd}`)
+        }
+        if (args[0] === 'remote') {
+          return 'origin\n'
+        }
+        if (args[0] === 'push' && args[1] === '-u' && args[2] === 'origin' && args[3] === 'memorytree') {
+          const error = new Error('Command failed: git push -u origin memorytree')
+          Object.assign(error, {
+            stderr: 'Authentication failed for https://x-access-token:super-secret-token@example.internal/repo.git\n',
+          })
+          throw error
+        }
+        throw new Error(`Unexpected git call: ${args.join(' ')}`)
+      },
+      execCommand: (_command: string, args: string[], options?: { cwd?: string; allowFailure?: boolean }) => {
+        if (options?.cwd !== developmentPath) {
+          throw new Error(`Unexpected cwd: ${options?.cwd}`)
+        }
+        if (args[0] === 'remote' && args[1] === 'get-url' && args[2] === 'origin') {
+          return 'https://x-access-token:super-secret-token@example.internal/repo.git\n'
+        }
+        if (args[0] === 'remote' && args[1] === 'get-url' && args[2] === '--push' && args[3] === 'origin') {
+          return 'https://x-access-token:super-secret-token@example.internal/repo.git\n'
+        }
+        if (args[0] === 'rev-parse' && args[1] === '--abbrev-ref' && args[2] === '--symbolic-full-name') {
+          return ''
+        }
+        if (
+          args[0] === '-c'
+          && args[1] === 'remote.origin.pushurl=https://x-access-token:super-secret-token@example.internal/repo.git'
+          && args[2] === 'push'
+          && args[3] === '-u'
+          && args[4] === 'origin'
+          && args[5] === 'memorytree'
+        ) {
+          const error = new Error('Command failed: fallback push')
+          Object.assign(error, {
+            stderr: 'Authentication failed for https://x-access-token:super-secret-token@example.internal/repo.git\n',
+          })
+          throw error
+        }
+        throw new Error(`Unexpected execCommand call: ${args.join(' ')}`)
+      },
+    }))
+
+    const { ensureBranchUpstream } = await import('../../src/heartbeat/worktree.js')
+
+    let thrown: unknown = null
+    try {
+      ensureBranchUpstream(developmentPath, 'memorytree')
+    } catch (error: unknown) {
+      thrown = error
+    }
+
+    expect(thrown).toBeInstanceOf(Error)
+    expect((thrown as Error).message).toContain('Primary push URL: https://***@example.internal/repo.git')
+    expect((thrown as Error).message).toContain('Fallback push URL: https://***@example.internal/repo.git')
+    expect((thrown as Error).message).not.toContain('super-secret-token')
+  })
 })
*** End Patch

assistant #405 final_answer 02:33:14

两个 review 问题已经修掉了。

一是把 remote URL 输出和错误信息都做了脱敏，避免把带 token 的 HTTPS URL 打进终端、日志或异常里。实现主要在 [worktree.ts](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/worktree.ts#L39)、[cmd-daemon.ts](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/cmd-daemon.ts#L234)、[heartbeat.ts](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts#L351)。二是恢复了“已有 tracking upstream 时按原 upstream 语义推送”，现在 fallback 仍然可用，但默认路径回到 plain git push，不会再强行按本地分支名推到远端，核心修复在 [worktree.ts](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/worktree.ts#L140)。

我也补了回归测试，覆盖了 URL 脱敏、已有 upstream 的 push 语义，以及之前的 SSH/HTTPS fallback 行为，见 [worktree.test.ts](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/tests/heartbeat/worktree.test.ts#L138) 和 [daemon.test.ts](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/tests/cli/daemon.test.ts#L239)。验证已通过：npm run typecheck，npm test -- --run tests/heartbeat/worktree.test.ts tests/heartbeat/branch-safety.test.ts tests/cli/daemon.test.ts。

还有一个提醒：仓库里原本就有未归属的 package-lock.json 改动，我还是没有碰它。起 PR 时建议继续只带这次涉及的源码和测试文件。

Show task summary

两个 review 问题已经修掉了。

一是把 remote URL 输出和错误信息都做了脱敏，避免把带 token 的 HTTPS URL 打进终端、日志或异常里。实现主要在 [worktree.ts](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/worktree.ts#L39)、[cmd-daemon.ts](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/cli/cmd-daemon.ts#L234)、[heartbeat.ts](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/heartbeat.ts#L351)。二是恢复了“已有 tracking upstream 时按原 upstream 语义推送”，现在 fallback 仍然可用，但默认路径回到 plain git push，不会再强行按本地分支名推到远端，核心修复在 [worktree.ts](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/src/heartbeat/worktree.ts#L140)。

我也补了回归测试，覆盖了 URL 脱敏、已有 upstream 的 push 语义，以及之前的 SSH/HTTPS fallback 行为，见 [worktree.test.ts](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/tests/heartbeat/worktree.test.ts#L138) 和 [daemon.test.ts](/C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/tests/cli/daemon.test.ts#L239)。验证已通过：npm run typecheck，npm test -- --run tests/heartbeat/worktree.test.ts tests/heartbeat/branch-safety.test.ts tests/cli/daemon.test.ts。

还有一个提醒：仓库里原本就有未归属的 package-lock.json 改动，我还是没有碰它。起 PR 时建议继续只带这次涉及的源码和测试文件。
